subject: President Trump unveils vision to rebuild our cities
body:
President Trump spoke to community and faith leaders at Gateway Church in Dallas today, where he presented his vision for advancing... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=dace69bd96&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • June 11, 2020
---
| | |
# **President Trump unveils vision to rebuild our cities**

**President Trump** spoke to community and faith leaders at Gateway Church in Dallas today, where he presented his vision for advancing the causes of justice and freedom.

**Americans are outraged** by the horrific killing of George Floyd. The President has directed Attorney General Bill Barr to expedite a federal investigation into the incident. Together, we must ensure that such injustices never happen again in our country.

**Unfortunately, extremists** want to exploit this tragedy to push a radical agenda that will only lead to more crime, poverty, and suffering. We can’t let that happen, either.

🎬 [President Trump: Sadly, some want only to stoke political division ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d5eae33644&e=3ee4985eea)

**There is no freedom** or opportunity without safety. In Chicago, 48 people were shot and 18 were killed on Sunday, May 31—the most violent day in Chicago in 60 years.

**Eighteen people**. One day. That’s shocking, heartbreaking, and unacceptable. No American child should ever grow up in a community that can’t protect them. Fear and violence should never be part of the daily routine for any American family.

**Under President Trump** , our cities have made progress. Violent crime and murder rates have fallen. Unfair sentencing rules from the 1994 Clinton crime law were reversed. The United States achieved its lowest black unemployment rate in history.

🎬 [President Trump: I will never stop fighting for forgotten Americans](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1abc72b0b7&e=3ee4985eea)

**Real progress** —racial justice, economic growth, religious freedom, and more—means building on these successes, not tearing them down. Today in Dallas, President Trump unveiled his plan for revitalizing America’s cities and distressed communities. It stands in stark contrast to a far-left vision of no policing, no investment, and no opportunity:

1. **Policing.** The President announced that he is finalizing an Executive Order to encourage police departments nationwide to meet the highest standards in the use of force by police officers, including tactics for de-escalation.

2. **Access to capital.** In addition to Opportunity Zone tax cuts for underserved communities, the Administration is working to set aside billions in federal loan dollars to assist African-American business owners directly.

3. **Healthcare.** President Trump wants to fix disparities in healthcare outcomes for minority communities. That means improving access to high-quality telemedicine, increasing the use of mobile care and testing, reforming public health data practices, and addressing chronic conditions for at-risk populations.

4. **Education choice.** A child’s zip code should not limit his or her future. President Trump is calling on Congress to enact school choice immediately, finally giving African-American children real access to high-quality education.

**Government works best** not when it dictates from above, but when it liberates from below. President Trump’s agenda will lift the forgotten men and women of our country by making every single American community a safe, prosperous place to call home.

🎬 [_Secretary Ben Carson: We the people are not each other’s enemies_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0c19ba1bb5&e=3ee4985eea)

**MORE** : [President Trump explains upcoming Executive Order on policing](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a49352cac5&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
| **Vice President Mike Pence participates in a listening session with community leaders** | June 9, 2020
---
|

name: Nina Ahmad
subject: IMMEDIATE RELEASE: Dr. Nina Ahmad Wins Democratic Primary for Pennsylvania Auditor General
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina for PA
body:
| | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/bQgXfn_ET9USDaUzbyioefuWzK00yuOfw4QT9AVwExg=/_wC7BqNPBGOsQmUsyf17ToIrTG39PDfHJTnDN1MWHVU=) **Dr. Nina Ahmad Wins** **Democratic Primary for ****Pennsylvania Auditor General** For Immediate Release June 11, 2020 **PHILADELPHIA, PA** -- With her lead over her closest competitor at nearly 70,000 votes and growing, today Dr. Nina Ahmad's campaign for Pennsylvania auditor general announced that she won the hotly contested, six-way Democratic primary for Pennsylvania auditor general. Michael Lamb, the Pittsburgh City Controller and a top candidate for auditor general, called Dr. Ahmad yesterday to offer his congratulations on her win and to graciously offer his help this Fall. "First, I'd like to thank the three other women and two men who ran for auditor general for running strong campaigns based on progressive ideas for delivering positive change in our commonwealth," said Dr. Ahmad. "Second, as a board member for the National Organization for Women, I was particularly proud that so many highly qualified women ran for this important office. I hope that's a sign of things to come. Last, but definitely not least, I can't thank enough the broad coalition of progressives, unions, and community leaders from across the state who supported my campaign. I promised change and voters responded resoundingly by electing a new face and a new voice. I am deeply humbled." Dr. Ahmad came to the United States alone, having survived a violent war for independence in Bangladesh. She waitressed and worked other minimum wage jobs before earning a Ph.D. in Chemistry at the University of Pennsylvania. Dr. Ahmad worked as a medical scientist at Wills Eye Hospital and Thomas Jefferson Medical College, served as Deputy Mayor of Philadelphia, and is the former President of Philly NOW. She also proudly served President Barack Obama as a member of his National Advisory Commission on Asian Americans and Pacific Islanders. Dr. Ahmad and her husband, Ahsan Nasratullah, live in the Mt. Airy neighborhood of Philadelphia where they raised two daughters, Priya and Joya. By winning the statewide Democratic primary, Dr. Ahmad became the first immigrant and person of color ever to be nominated by Democrats for statewide executive office in Pennsylvania. Dr. Ahmad ran on a platform of using the office of auditor general as a tool for change, transparency, and accountability. As a medical scientist, Dr. Ahmad also campaigned on using facts and evidence - not fear and division - to help improve the quality of life for our citizens. In declaring victory, Dr. Ahmad, who won Southeastern Pennsylvania by a large margin, vowed to work closely with her former opponents and reach out to voters in all regions of the state. In the months ahead she will work to build excitement and energy with in the party and grow her coalition of support for the General Election in November. "I'm looking forward to hitting the campaign trail with Vice President Joe Biden, Attorney General Josh Shapiro, and State Treasurer Joe Torsella," said Dr. Ahmad. "I know that, together, we can deliver the change Pennsylvanians want. We can rebuild our economy in a way that boosts our small businesses, and benefits working and middle-class families. We can ensure that police reform and criminal justice reform remain front and center. And as auditor general, I will view all of the audits that the office conducts through the lens of racial equity, I will work to stamp out sexual harassment and discrimination in state government, and change the culture in Harrisburg." Contact: Mark Nevins [mark@doverstrategygroup.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/bQgXfn_ET9USDaUzbyioefuWzK00yuOfw4QT9AVwExg=/zt_dQbKUc7xUlfbB8S8OkNVhffvbA85Y6lDkRk63-uc=) # # # [](https://act.myngp.com/el/bQgXfn_ET9USDaUzbyioefuWzK00yuOfw4QT9AVwExg=/_wC7BqNPBGOsQmUsyf17ToIrTG39PDfHJTnDN1MWHVU=) Learn more by visiting our website: [**_www.NinaForPA.com_**](https://act.myngp.com/el/bQgXfn_ET9USDaUzbyioefuWzK00yuOfw4QT9AVwExg=/35_O_4u5_oKT8vZtdEZLrV8du97gAvf1_3eDW_Y1bkI=) Follow us on Social Media: [](https://act.myngp.com/el/bQgXfn_ET9USDaUzbyioefuWzK00yuOfw4QT9AVwExg=/VXOTyWwXRAmaT4jWYYhRvxrJl29bITDDb6AQh7pm_SY=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/bQgXfn_ET9USDaUzbyioefuWzK00yuOfw4QT9AVwExg=/331OWrwENmOg1_o35idopAeFr6jl_e7N1a_Bg4zCW4s=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/bQgXfn_ET9USDaUzbyioefuWzK00yuOfw4QT9AVwExg=/7y17wDl7RyFqLWIGAYyqMVDw9Ep4TSCagahcKabo7hM=?hl=en)

But in a cynical acknowledgement of reality, they are now requiring attendees at Trump's Tulsa rally to release the campaign of liability should they contract the disease at the event. You can't gaslight a virus. Apparently Trump's lawyers realize that. On a positive note, we've got momentum to restore common sense and competency to Washington. As of yesterday morning, only eleven days into the month, __we surpassed our previous record and are having our best fundraising month ever__. Having the resources to get our message out is critical - so we can't rest on that accomplishment. This is only at the beginning. We need to build on the momentum. My remaining Republican opponents are "more of the same" candidates. clean_body: | Rick Kennedy (D-Central Texas) is running for the open seat in the 17th District.= Dear Friend, Trump and his enablers are trying very hard to get Americans to ignore the ongoing COVID-19 pandemic. But in a cynical acknowledgement of reality, they are now requiring attendees at Trump's Tulsa rally to release the campaign of liability should they contract the disease at the event. You can't gaslight a virus. Apparently Trump's lawyers realize that. On a positive note, we've got momentum to restore common sense and competency to Washington. As of yesterday morning, only eleven days into the month, we surpassed our previous record and are having our best fundraising month ever. Having the resources to get our message out is critical - so we can't rest on that accomplishment. This is only at the beginning. We need to build on the momentum. My remaining Republican opponents are "more of the same" candidates. You deserve much better. =. If you've saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | =** Thank you, and stay safe. Rick | Paid for by Rick Kennedy for Congress Rick Kennedy for Congress 2203 Emmett Pkwy Austin, TX 78726 To unsubscribe, please .

name: Tom Cotton
subject: I'm endorsing Bill Hagerty
body:
I'm joining President Trump in endorsing Bill.
Peter,I'm proud to join President Trump, the Trump Family, and conservative leaders endorsing Bill Hagerty in Tennessee's U.S. Senate race.**Will you join me in supporting Bill by making a donation today?**[**DONATE $25 RIGHT NOW**](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pjjutjd-fuutjhhtj-r/)[**DONATE $50 RIGHT NOW**](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pjjutjd-fuutjhhtj-y/)[**DONATE $100 RIGHT NOW**](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pjjutjd-fuutjhhtj-j/)[**DONATE ANY OTHER AMOUNT**](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pjjutjd-fuutjhhtj-t/) As a United States Senator, I know that Bill is the type of conservative fighter we need. name: MAGASOTA
subject: We Launched Freedom and Liberty
body:
| Peter --

I'm happy to share with you Tuesday night we finally launched the **Freedom and Liberty 2020 campaign for President Trump**. We were delayed several months by the unexpected COVID-19 and the anarchy in Minneapolis. Dedicated and motivated Trump supporters were not deterred by the heat. _It was like a family reunion but better_. _No one argued_ _about politics._ We had supporters all the way from Little Falls attending. **We agree that we have very little time to waste** _._ The work is immediate. **We also agree that we are at war**. It is freedom and liberty versus anarchy. We cannot take anything for granted and must work like our life depends on it. Because it does. **President Trump needs your help in Minnesota**. We have 98 days before early voting starts. Please call today with your commitment 952-818-9555! Here is our beautiful campaign for our amazing President.

We are making a financial commitment to have literature available for our door to door team members. This is a substantial sum -over $10,000.00. We would be so incredibly grateful for any financial assistance www.magasota.com/contribute

Our next MAGASOTA meetup will be June 16th 6:30-8 pm at the Chanhassen AutoPlex 8150 Audubon Rd Chanhassen. Space is limited. Please reserve your seat [mnfreedom2018@gmail.com](mailto:mnfreedom2018@gmail.com) Have a great weekend! -Michele Even

MAGASOTA
[http://www.magasota.com/](http://www.magasota.com/?e=ae7c075f3228267010e570c56948845c&utm_source=magasota&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=freedom_and_liberty_ii&n=1)

name: Emily Frost
subject: Pitching in:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY MARGARET GOOD FOR CONGRESS
body:
The Suncoast communities are in need of new leadership, and we can all do our part to make sure Margaret is that leader.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17841030/208332575/-940294256?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODA2OTk4OS1jMGFjLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XDWWxgBOE8pKQb-Li3t7F2io3b2SQkq6VfqyzY8yoPU=&emci=422da3d4-adac-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=d8069989-c0ac-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=9814644) Hi there,

I just joined the campaign as the new Field Director, and I’m so excited to hit the ground running in the fight to flip this seat!

The Suncoast communities are in need of new leadership, and we can all do our part to make sure Margaret is that leader.

Margaret has a history of winning tough seats, and what we know from our past success is that we win together when every single person does what they can to help bring the change we deserve. So we’re asking you to step up to do what you can to help.

**[Click here to sign up and we will schedule volunteer shifts that work for you!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17841031/208332576/192916899?contactdata=ggH2w%2BwOVWxVGBSSF%2F8AarZNYj1q13O5xLpNLCG59CWBCgOAD2DzKxjQ7Xt6dO1N%2BShQDdxtzZP6MwqYKVsVf%2FU6FkR%2FmHjrqHsFpAyRddzZvQuprV7JO9Mz9X38PRCwjT438chtp7hQxskhSoyyGQ%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODA2OTk4OS1jMGFjLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XDWWxgBOE8pKQb-Li3t7F2io3b2SQkq6VfqyzY8yoPU=&emci=422da3d4-adac-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=d8069989-c0ac-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=9814644)**

2020 is the year we bring bold leaders like Margaret to change the direction of our country.

But creating big, bold change doesn’t happen without real, hard work.

In order to win this race, we need to sign up thousands of people to Vote By Mail—and we need your help to do it.

We have scheduled lots of virtual phone banks in the coming weeks and we need your help to fill them. You can make calls from home and we will work with you to make sure you have all the information and training you need, but we really need your help. This is an all hands on deck effort!

**[It’s time to step up and sign up! Click here to schedule a volunteer shift with Team Good!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17841032/208332577/192916899?contactdata=ggH2w%2BwOVWxVGBSSF%2F8AarZNYj1q13O5xLpNLCG59CWBCgOAD2DzKxjQ7Xt6dO1N%2BShQDdxtzZP6MwqYKVsVf%2FU6FkR%2FmHjrqHsFpAyRddzZvQuprV7JO9Mz9X38PRCwjT438chtp7hQxskhSoyyGQ%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODA2OTk4OS1jMGFjLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XDWWxgBOE8pKQb-Li3t7F2io3b2SQkq6VfqyzY8yoPU=&emci=422da3d4-adac-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=d8069989-c0ac-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=9814644)**

With your help, we will expand our base of voters and spread the word about Margaret.

Every hour you spend phone banking is an hour spent towards winning this election and making the change we deserve!

Thank you!

Emily Frost
| [Donate »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17841033/208332578/1073285021?refcode=em06122020&amount=25&recurring=auto&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODA2OTk4OS1jMGFjLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XDWWxgBOE8pKQb-Li3t7F2io3b2SQkq6VfqyzY8yoPU=)

| Margaret Good is a lawyer, runner, and state representative running in FL-16 to change the face of Southwest Florida, and we are so proud to have you on our team. Margaret is a strong voice for our values—she brings an incredible work ethic and common sense to her fight for working families, to protect Florida’s fragile environment, for accessible and affordable healthcare, and against the special interests that have hijacked our political process. _We need to send her to Congress to continue fighting for us._

Email is the best way for us to keep you informed about what’s happening with the campaign, and we are excited to have your support! You may notice that we send a lot of emails asking for your support—that’s because we win when everyone does what they can to help. Our campaign has taken a pledge to reject corporate PAC money and is instead funded by thousands of actual people who care about our democracy and want to see positive change in our community and across our country. **[If you'd like to donate, click here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17841034/208332579/788213855?refcode=emfooter&amount=25&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODA2OTk4OS1jMGFjLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XDWWxgBOE8pKQb-Li3t7F2io3b2SQkq6VfqyzY8yoPU=)**

If you’d like to volunteer, **[click here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17841035/208332580/192916899?contactdata=ggH2w%2BwOVWxVGBSSF%2F8AarZNYj1q13O5xLpNLCG59CWBCgOAD2DzKxjQ7Xt6dO1N%2BShQDdxtzZP6MwqYKVsVf%2FU6FkR%2FmHjrqHsFpAyRddzZvQuprV7JO9Mz9X38PRCwjT438chtp7hQxskhSoyyGQ%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODA2OTk4OS1jMGFjLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XDWWxgBOE8pKQb-Li3t7F2io3b2SQkq6VfqyzY8yoPU=&emci=422da3d4-adac-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=d8069989-c0ac-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=9814644)**

Every hour you spend phone banking is an hour spent towards winning this election and making the change we deserve! Thank you! Emily Frost | = | Margaret Good is a lawyer, runner, and state representative running in FL-16 to change the face of Southwest Florida, and we are so proud to have you on our team. Margaret is a strong voice for our values—she brings an incredible work ethic and common sense to her fight for working families, to protect Florida’s fragile environment, for accessible and affordable healthcare, and against the special interests that have hijacked our political process. We need to send her to Congress to continue fighting for us. Email is the best way for us to keep you informed about what’s happening with the campaign, and we are excited to have your support! You may notice that we send a lot of emails asking for your support—that’s because we win when everyone does what they can to help. Our campaign has taken a pledge to reject corporate PAC money and is instead funded by thousands of actual people who care about our democracy and want to see positive change in our community and across our country. = If you’d like to volunteer, If you’d like to unsubscribe, we hate to see you go, but click here to . PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY MARGARET GOOD FOR CONGRESS Margaret Good for Congress PO Box 5073 Sarasota, FL 34277 United States

Hosts: Susan & Neil Iscoe, David Lee, Dan Siegel & Anne Weills, National Union of Healthcare Workers, Communication Workers of America, IBEW Local 716, Mike Lewis, and Michael & Karen Collins Co-Hosts: Zohaib Qadri, Robert Scheer & Narda Zacchino, Ana Salas-Porras & Bill King, Howard & Marijo Hartman, Bret Kadison, Karen Grove, Blue America, Joe Reynolds, John Mitchell, Lydia Brazon, Megan Field, John Peterson & Lin Sealy, and Kathryn Rogers Sponsors: George & Helen Dillingham, David & Karen Cohn, Jonathan Siegel, Thomas Meyer, Robin McMillion, Melissa & Tim Gray, Eric Vormelker & Lisa Schneider, John Borsos, Hedrich Michaelsen, Mary Pat Trenkle, Matt Perrenod, Julie Zuniga, Carol Edwards, and Charlotte Koskoff Co-Sponsors: Sam Arnold, Ann Hartness, Vick Roling Hines, Bill Monning, Eugenia Floyd, Nate Miley, Joyce Lilly, Harry Jordan, Vanessa MacDougal, Steve Early & Suzanne Gordon, Terry Weber & Dinky Romilly, Wayne & Sharise Lefferd, Jonel Daphnis, Kathy Carvell, Carrie Falk, Terrell Blodgett, Lawrence Lawver, Aishatu Sani, Doug Kadison, Carol Teitelman, Joyce & Mark Brown, Nancy Barret, Jack Land, Kathy Barrett, Carole Travis, and Michael Whellan We need your help to spread the word about this campaign all throughout this district. I look forward to you joining us on June 13th for this awesome event! Thank you for standing with us as we work hard to create real change in this district and provide the type of representation the Texas 10th needs. Fighting for you, Mike Siegel ** = PO Box 2409 Austin, TX 78701

subject: My discussion with President Trump
body:
Take two minutes to check out my roundtable discussion with President Trump yesterday at Gateway Church in Dallas. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/willdouglasfortexas/president-trump-roundtable-6-11-2020?e=4f010155df)
---
| | [ ](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=b1e4976b26&e=4f010155df)
---
| | Friends,

As a country, it’s absolutely imperative that we come together for a conversation on fixing historic economic, health, and justice disparities in American communities — and it was an honor to take part in that conversation yesterday as a participant in the President’s 'Transition to Greatness' Roundtable on Restoring, Rebuilding, and Renewing.
---
| [ ](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=30a81335b5&e=4f010155df)
---
| My personal experience as a self-made pharmacy owner from blue-collar upbringings is the epitome of the American Dream, and I’m running for State House to make living that American Dream more attainable for more of our families.
I look forward to continuing having discussions with people from all walks of life as we seek solutions to the great issues of our time.

Please take two minutes to watch my discussion with President Trump: [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=GEsIgZ-YZ9E](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=ac386c333c&e=4f010155df)

Then, please consider [clicking here to make a secure donation](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=34c95e2207&e=4f010155df), to help sustain our fight to Keep Texas "RED" this November.

For Texas,

| Will Douglas
Republican Nominee for Texas House District 113

name: Mark Warner
subject: TAKE ACTION: protect your First Amendment rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| | Derek --

More than 30 years ago, Lisa and I got married in a little church called St. Johns across the street from the White House. And while I was saddened to learn that it incurred minor damage by a small fire during the early days of the protests, I was horrified when I watched the President send in federal police in riot gear to gas peaceful protestors so he could hold up a Bible for a cheap photo-op.

The President's actions were an insult to the First Amendment, which protects the rights of Americans to assemble, speak out, and hold our government accountable. We are seeing our Constitution in action around the country as Americans of every race, religion, and background are calling for racial justice through peaceful protests, and we must defend their right to do so.

**That 's why I'm demanding the Trump administration stop using police and military force against Americans peacefully exercising their First Amendment rights. Will you join me?** | **[Add my name](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d45e/53d9897e/54bc0d20/1c887c0c/1650317955/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/s/warner-1stamendmentpetition")**
---
People across the country are speaking out to condemn the shocking use of force against peaceful protesters fighting for racial justice. This week, more than 1,200 former Justice Department employees went a step further and called for an official investigation into Attorney General William Barr's role in the incident. And several members of the Trump administration, including the Secretary of Defense and the Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff have apologized for their participation in this shameful stunt. Unfortunately the President and Attorney General are doubling down, and that means we need to continue to stand up for our First Amendment.

Derek, we can't allow the President, the Attorney General, or anyone in the Trump administration to abuse their authority and violate the constitutional rights they swore to defend. In the Senate, I'm working to make sure we limit the President's power to use force against peaceful protestors exercising their constitutional rights, and I encourage you to join me in that effort today.

**[Add your name now to demand that the Trump administration honor the First Amendment rights of all Americans.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d45e/53d9897e/54bc0d20/1c887c0c/1650317955/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/s/warner-1stamendmentpetition")**

Thank you,

Mark Warner

**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d45e/53d9897e/54bc0d20/1c887c0b/1650317955/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYwOCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-db?refcode=20200612_p_1_fl__608__&refcode2=cont&amount=10")**
---

|
---

Friends of Mark Warner
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

[Unsubscribe](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d45e/53d9897e/54bc0d20/1c887c0a/1650317955/VEsC/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/unsubscribe")

| | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
---

name: Sandy Smith
subject: Back the Blue
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SANDY SMITH FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=iLHDUn6eJpNxmng&b=jMMTcFfPZTXQ1N43E2Rn8g

Dear Peter,

I am Sandy Smith, the Republican nominee for Congress in North Carolina’s newly redrawn 1st Congressional district.

As you may know, I come from a military family- including my husband and my children. My family has a legacy of service to keeping the American people safe.

Let me be clear: those who seek to riot and burn, then to blame our brave police for their violence and mistakes, CANNOT be allowed to "defund the police"!

These riots were never "peaceful protests". They were grotesquely violent: over 150 killed, over 20 cops killed, hundreds of businesses and homes burned.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=iLHDUn6eJpNxmng&b=jMMTcFfPZTXQ1N43E2Rn8g

Three black cops and several black civilians were murdered by the rioters, meaning that it was likely never about "black lives matter" in the first place.

Of course, it was never just protesters. Antifa, foreign actors and what Bill Barr called a "witch's brew" of bad actors drove the violence, arson and murder.

The federal officials gathered with Mr. Barr said they’re tracking the violence nationwide, pointing to investigations into more than 800 arsons and 76 explosive devices at protests. They described the violent actors behind them, from Antifa to the far-right Boogaloo movement.

Mr. Barr called it a “witch’s brew,” and FBI Director Christopher A. Wray said different groups are involved in different cities.

Underpinning some of the dissension are the same foreign actors who have tried to meddle in American politics in the past, the officials said — though they didn’t name specific countries nor say exactly what they’ve seen.

Mr. Barr said they are “playing all sides to exacerbate the violence.”

“I believe we have evidence that some foreign hackers and groups associated with foreign governments are focused on this particular situation we have here and exacerbate it every way they can,” he said.

So, possibly Russians or Iranians or ISIS are stirring up a revolution on our streets from young extreme leftists who are murdering cops.

But actually, it's worse than that.

Antifa may be useful idiots to the Russians, but President Trump is not fooled. He is taking on that threat head on!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=iLHDUn6eJpNxmng&b=jMMTcFfPZTXQ1N43E2Rn8g

Sensing weakness in Democrat politicians like New York's DeBlasio, or Chicago's Lightfoot, these Antifa rioters have begun to list demands.... starting with defunding- or eliminating- the police.

Already Minneapolis is disbanding the police, urged on by the odious Ilhan Omar:

Democratic Rep. Ilhan Omar went beyond calls to defund the police following the death of George Floyd, instead calling for dismantling the Minneapolis Police Department because it is “rotten to the root.”

“We need to completely dismantle the Minneapolis Police Department. Because here’s the thing, there’s a cancer,” she said, continuing that amputation is needed so it doesn’t spread.

Now, anyone who was paying attention knows that these radicals have wanted to get rid of the police all along, so they wouldn't pay for the crimes they committed while rioting.

Can you imagine how things would go with no police to answer the 911 calls?

If your wife or daughter is in danger of getting raped... you call, and get a "ritual healer"?

If a dangerous drug addict breaks into your house and threatens your life, you call and get.... a "conflict negotiator"?

If you get caught up in a gang fight or a drug cartel war, who will you call? Your local Antifa rep?

These people don't care about your safety. They want to protect criminals with impunity.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=iLHDUn6eJpNxmng&b=jMMTcFfPZTXQ1N43E2Rn8g

We need to restore law and order NOW. I will work with President Trump to hunt down, prosecute, and imprison any member of Antifa who participated in domestic terrorism.

If you support our "President of Law and Order", as I do, I need YOUR help urgently

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=iLHDUn6eJpNxmng&b=jMMTcFfPZTXQ1N43E2Rn8g
to defeat my high-level radical socialist Democrat opponent and retake this swing seat!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=iLHDUn6eJpNxmng&b=jMMTcFfPZTXQ1N43E2Rn8g

President Trump has accomplished so much with constant pushback from these unreasonable socialists, like these governors and mayors. Imagine what he can do with a supportive Congress!

Will you help me beat anti-cop Socialist G.K. Butterfield and deprive Nancy Pelosi of a reliable vote?

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=iLHDUn6eJpNxmng&b=jMMTcFfPZTXQ1N43E2Rn8g
I have a goal of $60,000 raised this month, before the fundraising quarter ends. I need your help!

I will NEVER vote with Nancy Pelosi and her "kneeling radicals"! She and her insane leftist agenda can pound sand!

Can you help me take this swing district back

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=iLHDUn6eJpNxmng&b=jMMTcFfPZTXQ1N43E2Rn8g
, with your best and immediate contribution of $15, $35, or $250? Taking out one of Pelosi’s leading lieutenants would be a major, crippling blow to the socialist anti-American left and to Nancy Pelosi’s agenda. Please rush back your supporting contribution today. Thank you.

G.K. Butterfield is a leftist extremist, not a patriot, but to replace him I really need your help

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=iLHDUn6eJpNxmng&b=jMMTcFfPZTXQ1N43E2Rn8g
. I appreciate you and thank you.

For God and Country,

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=iLHDUn6eJpNxmng&b=jMMTcFfPZTXQ1N43E2Rn8g

Sandy Smith

Republican for Congress, North Carolina's new First District

Conservative

Entrepreneur & Military mom

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=iLHDUn6eJpNxmng&b=jMMTcFfPZTXQ1N43E2Rn8g

P.S. Will you contribute $15, $60, $250, or your largest contribution?

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=iLHDUn6eJpNxmng&b=jMMTcFfPZTXQ1N43E2Rn8g
I need to reach my goal to catch up with Butterfield.

PAID FOR BY SANDY SMITH FOR CONGRESS INC

P.O. Box 434
Winterville NC 28590
USA

To unsubscribe or change subscriber options, visit:
https://www.aweber.com/z/r/?rMyMrEwcrLQcbIyMTGxMzLRGtCxs7IxsHGxM

subject: We can’t wait any longer
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌

http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=107361427186cf2c1ec2b54efe24ebe6741ff77d551ba4fdbf76338f232e2e854b09b3caf4360213e98d8947ce91c6bac186a68adc86881c

Friend,

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dani=20Brzozowski?=
subject: Fight back against the NRA
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dani for Illinois
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/bbd378a761ca/fight-back-against-the-nra?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| |
#
This last week, I received the Gun Sense Candidate distinction from Moms Demand Action. I wear this distinction as a badge of honor from an organization that has done so much to help end gun violence in America.

Like Moms Demand Action, I know that gun violence is preventable with common-sense public safety measures. **In Congress, I'll fight to close loopholes that put lives at risk, make sure we finally enact universal background checks and work to ban high-capacity magazines. **

These policies will save American lives, and they have the support of the vast majority of gun owners. **Responsible gun owners understand the need for common-sense gun safety laws.**

Unfortunately, **my Republican opponent is bought and paid for by the NRA,** so during his time in Congress he has stood in the way of common-sense gun safety proposals that could have saved lives.

It's time to replace Adam Kinzinger with someone who will put the safety of our children and our families first. **I can't be bought by the gun lobby.**

I'm proud to stand with Moms Demand Action, and I'm proud to have you on my side in this fight.

Dani Brzozowski
Democratic Nominee for Congress, IL-16
---

**The House needs quality leaders to fight for the needs of the people, not weak Pelosi puppets.** Stand with me today to give power back to the people by unseating the Pelosi pushover Conor Lamb.

The people of Pennsylvania’s 17th District deserve a leader who is in tune with their needs and values, and an ally of President Trump to get things done.

**Join me in supporting Sean Parnell today.** Together, we can continue Sean’s exemplary momentum and better the chances of bringing a strong conservative voice to Congress.
Thank you,

Josh Hawley

Subject: I endorse Sean Parnell!

**We cannot afford a Democrat majority in the House again this coming fall.** It is imperative that we flip the House to put an end to Pelosi’s power trip, and restore Congress with people that will help President Trump continue making this country better for the people! **Sean is a natural leader** , and he has the strength and courage to stop the socialist agenda in the House and deliver growth and job opportunities for the people of this country. **With President Trump’s complete and total endorsement** , I know Sean is the best candidate for the job.
[ ](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=d9c41aef7c1c41b3a3934c2c37d6aa93&_e=cLeAaF0lM_nFdykYCvRasXf0V3wKfHVYM6JtPPZGO9OGn8L1ajdJhtjpCVwmRCkptp3pC6MGGeGawc03rrMkHIBwA8CTzXN8x5Mk_XnmUWhyxK6w4WQU8Ijw2lKXLRGwbFsvjp896Wuz8NvEVw6ZX648_IdkGUMvmy_VtBrk0w61D5AqIX-SLDo_YmE8ZNUlSBQBd6k85RC6SQgAVBWQZGkh-KAbHwB6MdlRD0pMJojDUNA9XeBRDy807QHKkzZcHdsv8vODEwEkZNUImddbKQTn-wVghQAdvP_cwarqLc1FmF6zl-3LW1jr5y5YLCNHitFN_hacH6fbnqJ-cv75YFqNMknmEpHHNNrhh_t-UcwOBM3BTuN-b9IAAqZIt0oYGsMGO8lmWL9WGe8cfybnpPuJg1mG2ZSxXLjB5CKgdus%3D)

name: Team Hicks
subject: BREAKING: Hicks outraises Barr in latest fundraising report
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Josh Hicks for Congress
body:
We’ve got some amazing news, friends! The pre-primary fundraising reports are out, and we’ve outraised Andy Barr by nearly $45,000 (more than 20%!) this quarter. Can you pitch in $10 or $25 to help us keep the lead? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jhicks-june?amount=10&refcode=20200612_em_fr_outraisingbarr_all_pt1]
When Josh launched this campaign last summer, plenty of people said that a country boy from Fleming County couldn’t run for US Congress. They said we couldn’t raise the money required to compete with Andy Barr and Mitch McConnell’s dark money machine.

Thanks to supporters like you we’re proving them wrong. Will you chip in $10 or $25 to keep the momentum going? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/jhicks-june?amount=10&refcode=20200612_em_fr_outraisingbarr_all_pt2]
Why is it such a big deal that we outraised Andy Barr?
Barr was anointed by Mitch McConnell himself. And over the past decade, Andy Barr has accepted well over $2 million in corporate PAC money, including over $100,000 from the pharmaceutical industry.
Josh has refused corporate PAC contributions since day one. We’re staying competitive by living our values.
It’s great that our team is ahead right now, but we also know this news will light a fire under Barr’s campaign. Barr’s party bosses and buddies in the White House will be racing to his rescue once they see our fundraising numbers.
With the help of grassroots supporters like you, we’ve shown that you don’t have to take corporate cash or kiss up to Big Pharma if you want to be of service to the families and communities across Kentucky’s 6th district. Regular folks like Josh can get it done. But we can’t let up now.
If you can, please chip in $10 or $25 today and help our campaign keep charging ahead. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/jhicks-june?amount=10&refcode=20200612_em_fr_outraisingbarr_all_pt3]
Thank you for your support,
-- Team Hicks

[secure.actblue.com/donate/jhicks-june?refcode=20200612_em_fr_outraisingbarr_all_ptftr]
Paid For By Josh Hicks for Congress
Josh Hicks for Congress
PO Box 1214
Lexington, KY 40588
United States
Josh Hicks is a Democrat running to represent Kentucky’s 6th Congressional District. He will be a representative who puts the needs of his constituents front and center in Washington. Josh grew up in Fleming County before leaving to serve in the Marines. After two deployments, he returned to Kentucky to serve his community as a police officer and attorney.
He’s running to represent hardworking, everyday Kentuckians. Not corporations. That means his campaign is relying on grassroots donations — lots of small donations from emails like this — not big checks from corporate special interests. Please consider making a $5 contribution to Josh’s campaign today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jhicks-june?amount=5&refcode=20200612_em_fr_outraisingbarr_all_ptftr2]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jhicks-june?refcode=20200612_em_fr_outraisingbarr_all_ptftr3]

name: Justina Machado
subject: Join me on Tuesday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People First Future
body:
I'm ready to fight for a people first future.
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17846493/208420305/-1445340428?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTYvMS83MjQyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNGY5YmFiMS1lMGFjLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fp4V4eoldHp0pA_bj3Qs6YggstO-6MwO40DqAYKbM3Y=&emci=63611637-d3ac-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=04f9bab1-e0ac-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=1262380)
Team,
As a Latina actress, I know how important it is to have a seat at the table. Whether it's in Hollywood or Washington, representation has never mattered more.
**[That's why I'm proud to invite you to join me and Secretary Julián Castro at People First Future's first virtual grassroots fundraiser this Tuesday with Candance Valenzuela, ahead of her July runoff election in Texas.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17846494/208420306/-1754580679?refcode=em20200612-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTYvMS83MjQyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNGY5YmFiMS1lMGFjLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fp4V4eoldHp0pA_bj3Qs6YggstO-6MwO40DqAYKbM3Y=)**
[RSVP here →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17846495/208420307/-1754580679?refcode=em20200612-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTYvMS83MjQyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNGY5YmFiMS1lMGFjLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fp4V4eoldHp0pA_bj3Qs6YggstO-6MwO40DqAYKbM3Y=)
Candance overcame incredible odds, experiencing homelessness and poverty at a young age. But with the support of a good education, Candace became an educator, mother, and champion for her community.
She was the first Latina elected to her community's school board, and has fought her entire career so that more children can get a quality education and live out their own dreams.
Now she's running to represent Texas's 24th district in Congress — and she needs our help. With only a month until Election Day, she's counting on grassroots supporters like us to help her cross the finish line.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17846496/208420308/-1754580679?refcode=em20200612-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTYvMS83MjQyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNGY5YmFiMS1lMGFjLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fp4V4eoldHp0pA_bj3Qs6YggstO-6MwO40DqAYKbM3Y=)
**[Will you join me, Julián Castro, and Candace Valenzuela at 7:00 PM ET/6:00 PM CT this Tuesday for People First Future's first grassroots fundraiser?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17846497/208420309/-1754580679?refcode=em20200612-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTYvMS83MjQyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNGY5YmFiMS1lMGFjLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fp4V4eoldHp0pA_bj3Qs6YggstO-6MwO40DqAYKbM3Y=)**
We need elected leaders in Washington who have the courage to fight for us. Leaders who will help our communities recover from the coronavirus, or will act to end police violence.
Candace is one of those leaders. She knows that having a seat at the table is about more than representation — it's about fighting for the needs of those who need it most.
I'm proud to join Secretary Castro to fight alongside candidates like Candace. I hope you'll join us on Tuesday. Will we see you there?
[RSVP here →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17846498/208420310/-1754580679?refcode=em20200612-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTYvMS83MjQyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNGY5YmFiMS1lMGFjLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fp4V4eoldHp0pA_bj3Qs6YggstO-6MwO40DqAYKbM3Y=)
Thank you,
Justina Machado
Actress, One Day at a Time
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17846499/208420311/565258459?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTYvMS83MjQyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNGY5YmFiMS1lMGFjLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fp4V4eoldHp0pA_bj3Qs6YggstO-6MwO40DqAYKbM3Y=&emci=63611637-d3ac-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=04f9bab1-e0ac-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=1262380)

body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/tndp.jpg]
Dear Peter,
Over the past few weeks we've seen protest in support of racial equity, dismantling white supremacy, and ending police brutality in every part of the nation - and in every part of this great state.
Hundreds of people have turned out to march and peacefully protest in every corner of Tennessee, from our largest cities to our smallest towns.
Democrats across the state are joining Tennesseeans of all different backgroungs and demographics as they stand together to demand change.
Below are pictures shared with us from our county parties that make up just a small sample of what's happening across the state. THIS IS TENNESSEE - WE ARE TENNESSEE - and we're proud to be a part of this powerful and hopeful movement for change.
We are Tennessee,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/signature2.png]
Mary Mancini, Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party
PICTURES OF A MOVEMENT
FROM ACROSS TENNESSEE
Sweetwater, TN (Monroe County, East TN)
Organized by
Progressive Rural Overhill Women for Democracy
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/Unity3.jpg]
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/unity12.jpg]
Dresden, Greenfield, and Martin
(Weakley County, West TN)

Scott County (East TN)

[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/Screen%20Shot%202020-06-12%20at%209.57.31%20AM.png]
Clarksville (Montgomery County, Middle TN)

Knoxville (Knox County, East TN)

Nashville (Davidson County, Middle TN)

Columbia (Maury County, Middle TN)
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/Screen%20Shot%202020-06-12%20at%209.57.18%20AM.png]
THOUSANDS DEMAND REMOVAL OF
NATHAN BEDFORD FORREST BUST
GOVERNOR LEE AND GOP REFUSE
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/Screen%20Shot%202020-06-12%20at%2010.42.35%20AM.png]
Tennessee House and Senate Democrats pushed bills to remove the Nathan Bedford Forrest Bust. Protestors, praised by President Obama [https://twitter.com/BarackObama/status/1271147930460831751] , rallied outside demanding it be removed. Thousands took to social media, including Reese Witherspoon [https://twitter.com/ReeseW/status/1270899536005718016?ref_src=twsrc%5Etfw%7Ctwcamp%5Etweetembed%7Ctwterm%5E1270899536005718016&ref_url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.wjhl.com%2Fnews%2Fregional%2Ftennessee%2Ftenn-actress-reese-witherspoon-calls-on-gov-lee-to-remove-statue-of-nathan-bedford-forrest-on-twitter%2F] , asking Governor Bill Lee to remove the Bust. Governor Lee and Republican lawmakers removed all pleas and decided to continue to honor the white supremacist founder of the KKK.
“The Tennessee Democratic Party joins the call to remove the Nathan Bedford Forrest bust. Every day black legislators walk by and are reminded of the atrocities committed during the slave trade and feel the inherent threat behind its creation and placement. The bust was put in its current place of honor to intimidate black Tennesseans. It threatens, “stay in your place.” It warns, “you are not welcome here.” It loudly pronounces, “you are not equal.” The bust has no home in Tennessee, let alone in a place of honor right outside the state house and senate chambers. Tennessee Democrats will continue to join our allies with the work of dismantling both overt and hidden systemic racism, including the removal of these monuments to white supremacy.” – Mary Mancini, TNDP Chair
JUDGE THREATENS GOV. BILL LEE
AND SECRETARY OF STATE WITH
CONTEMPT OF COURT
Last week, a Judge overruled Governor Bill Lee and Tennessee Republican Legislators to mandate a no excuse absentee ballot measure. [https://tennesseelookout.com/2020/06/04/breaking-judge-strikes-down-tn-limits-on-absentee-voting-due-to-pandemic/?fbclid=IwAR3w-ilMDoTRxyUqjdIKWE4J0Jo5Np-Uf_jwLUI61DMYpIFBoXPnAS1L5tg] This week, the Secretary of State, the Governor, and the Attorney General appealed the judge's decision. In a win for democracy, the Judge threatened to hold the State in contempt of court after they denied the law and refused to expand absentee ballots.
"Shame on you for not following that procedure and just taking matters into your own hands," the judge told lawyers from the Tennessee Attorney General's office. "I'm calling the state out on that for not adhering to the standards of a legal process and not adhering to the order."
When we organize and stand for what are our rights, we can win. When we partner with the other side and stop with harmful party politics, we can exponentially improve lives in Tennessee. TNDP thanks for all the hard work each and every Tennesseean did to make this happen.
FUNDRAISER: PROTECT THE VOTE
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/protect-the-vote-3.png]
The vote is more important in 2020 than ever before. As our nation and state is in crisis, Republicans are deploying tactics to keep people from voting. We must protect the vote. Please support the TNDP 2020 Voter Protection Program by sponsoring or buying a ticket to this virtual event. THANK YOU!
Learn more and purchase your ticket now! [https://tndp.org/protect-vote-fundraiser/]

Nashville, TN 37217

body:

name: Susan Collins
subject: They tried to bribe me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Collins for Senator
body:
In 2018, the Far Left tried to bribe me. They promised me this: if I voted to confirm Justice Brett Kavanaugh, they would donate millions of dollars to my future opponent. But if I voted against him, the money would go away.
To unsubscribe click [here](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI3MTcxMDYS1&kn=15&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc4MTA3MDQwNAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI3MTcxMDYS1&kn=12&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc4MTA3MDQwNAS2&mt=1&rt=0)[****](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI3MTcxMDYS1&kn=16&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc4MTA3MDQwNAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Dear Peter,
In 2018, the Far Left tried to bribe me.
They promised me this: if I voted to confirm Justice Brett Kavanaugh, they would donate millions of dollars to my future opponent. But if I voted _against_ him, the money would go away.
**Despite the threats, I strongly stood my ground. No sum of money can make me vote a certain way. Make no mistake,_I cannot be bribed._**
Two years later, my opponent is on track to receive a **$4 million dollar boost** once she is officially elected as the Democratic nominee on July 14th. And the fund is still growing...

[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI3MTcxMDYS1&kn=2&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc4MTA3MDQwNAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Right now, my campaign is being outraised. In a few weeks, my opponent will receive an additional $4 million solely because I stood my ground. In order to stand a chance against the false attacks and this unprecedented amount of money, I need your support today.
[DONATE TO MY CAMPAIGN](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI3MTcxMDYS1&kn=4&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc4MTA3MDQwNAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
This election has proven that some people will stop at nothing to win this seat. [**Can you contribute any amount to my campaign today and help me fight back?**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI3MTcxMDYS1&kn=5&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc4MTA3MDQwNAS2&mt=1&rt=0) While my opponent has Chuck Schumer, Far Left billionaires, and a chest of $4 million waiting for her in July, I have YOU. Help my campaign catch up!
Thank you for your loyal support,
Susan Collins
[DONATE TO MY CAMPAIGN](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI3MTcxMDYS1&kn=4&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc4MTA3MDQwNAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

subject: Pat Hackett Makes Headline News
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pat Hackett for Congress
body:
| | | | [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=2bfe3f2bd7&e=5886ca081d)
---
| | | **HISTORIC RACE MAKING HEADLINES**
---
| [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=f806582f51&e=5886ca081d)
---
| Dear Friend,

Pat and our campaign for Dignity and Justice for All is in today’s headlines!

The homepage of today’s NBC News on-line article: “Another 'rainbow wave'? Dozens of LGBTQ political hopefuls are on June ballots” [**features Pat and other races of historic firsts.**](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=9251300304&e=5886ca081d)
> “As for the representational deficit, Pat Hackett of Indiana won her primary race for Congress and is vying to become the first openly gay member of Congress from the state. Hackett will face off in November against incumbent Republican Jackie Walorski, whose track record includes voting against LGBTQ protections.”
It’s time to make history in Indiana. Show your pride, IN-02!

| | **-June 12, 2020-** **-The 2020 Hoosier Hospitality Dinner, TONIGHT-** **** Our 2020 Virtual [Hoosier Hospitality Dinner](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17847205/208436490/-1853952297?emci=5650e39e-b7a1-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=%7B%7BContactsEmailID%7D%7D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTU2YjQ1ZC1lN2FjLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JCWFwan_mf2fLkorkF-KuO4hGl2p88cdcnHEMv1PQSY=) is tonight at 5:30 PM EST. This is a first-of-its-kind opportunity to hear from Democrats across the country without ever leaving your couch. We’re 144 days away from the most important election of our lives. Health care, teacher pay, voting rights, and equality are all on the ballot. And we have no time to waste. The Hoosier Hospitality Dinner is your chance to come together with other Democrats and get to work. Plus, this year's keynote speaker will be DCCC chair, Illinois Congresswoman Cheri Bustos! Cheri made history as the first woman elected to Congress in her district. Now, she's joining us in the fight to take back our nation in 2020. We’ve only got a few tickets left and they’re going fast. Get yours **[here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17847206/208436491/-1853952297?emci=5650e39e-b7a1-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=%7B%7BContactsEmailID%7D%7D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTU2YjQ1ZC1lN2FjLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JCWFwan_mf2fLkorkF-KuO4hGl2p88cdcnHEMv1PQSY=)** and we’ll see you tonight! **-The INDEMS 2020 Virtual State Convention, TOMORROW-** **** We have less than 24 hours until our 2020 Virtual State Convention starts! State Convention is where we vote on statewide candidates, start the voting process for national delegates, and ratify our 2020 platform. Plus, we’re live streaming our general session! Tune in tomorrow on [Facebook Live](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17847207/208436492/-269844829?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTU2YjQ1ZC1lN2FjLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JCWFwan_mf2fLkorkF-KuO4hGl2p88cdcnHEMv1PQSY=&emci=297a1915-fbab-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=ae56b45d-e7ac-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=4925535) at 2:30 PM EST for special messages from Linda Lawson, Dr. Woody Myers, Sen. Karen Tallian, Johnathan Weinzapfel, Joe Biden, Michigan Governor, Gretchen Whitmer, and DNC Chair, Tom Perez. Check out the 2020 program with events now until June 19th **[here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17847208/208436493/204070709?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTU2YjQ1ZC1lN2FjLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JCWFwan_mf2fLkorkF-KuO4hGl2p88cdcnHEMv1PQSY=&emci=297a1915-fbab-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=ae56b45d-e7ac-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=4925535)**. **-Volunteer Opportunity, June 15-17th-** **** We're gearing up for our 2020 State Convention on June 13th. And we're looking for volunteers to help count state delegates' ballots on June 15th - June 17th in Indianapolis. This is a critical step in the 2020 election; it's the last step in our process to select a nominee for attorney general and kick Curtis Hill out of office. So, we need all hands on deck. **[Sign up to help out here!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17847209/208436494/-1331949375?emci=ad31e52a-d7a9-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTU2YjQ1ZC1lN2FjLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JCWFwan_mf2fLkorkF-KuO4hGl2p88cdcnHEMv1PQSY=)** **\- Virtual Caucus Party-** This year, our constituency caucus are joining forces to throw a virtual after party. After the annual Hoosier Hospitality Dinner join the [Indiana Young](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17847210/208436495/850598178?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTU2YjQ1ZC1lN2FjLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JCWFwan_mf2fLkorkF-KuO4hGl2p88cdcnHEMv1PQSY=&emci=297a1915-fbab-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=ae56b45d-e7ac-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=4925535), [ Latino](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17847211/208436496/-677880266?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTU2YjQ1ZC1lN2FjLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JCWFwan_mf2fLkorkF-KuO4hGl2p88cdcnHEMv1PQSY=&emci=297a1915-fbab-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=ae56b45d-e7ac-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=4925535), [African American](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17847212/208436497/-366135678?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTU2YjQ1ZC1lN2FjLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JCWFwan_mf2fLkorkF-KuO4hGl2p88cdcnHEMv1PQSY=&emci=297a1915-fbab-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=ae56b45d-e7ac-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=4925535), and [Stonewall Democrats](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17847213/208436498/192630949?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTU2YjQ1ZC1lN2FjLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JCWFwan_mf2fLkorkF-KuO4hGl2p88cdcnHEMv1PQSY=&emci=297a1915-fbab-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=ae56b45d-e7ac-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=4925535) for their first-ever [Virtual Caucus Party](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17847214/208436499/1440518510?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTU2YjQ1ZC1lN2FjLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JCWFwan_mf2fLkorkF-KuO4hGl2p88cdcnHEMv1PQSY=&emci=297a1915-fbab-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=ae56b45d-e7ac-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=4925535)! Grab your favorite drink, listen to a local DJ, and celebrate pride with a live virtual Drag performance by Miss Indy Pride 2019: Amelia Bearhardt. Each caucus will give updates on the crucial work they're doing around the state and talk about the importance of diversity and inclusion in our party. There will even be a chance to win prizes. All are welcome! Register now by [visiting the Facebook event.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17847215/208436500/1440518510?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTU2YjQ1ZC1lN2FjLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JCWFwan_mf2fLkorkF-KuO4hGl2p88cdcnHEMv1PQSY=&emci=297a1915-fbab-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=ae56b45d-e7ac-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=4925535) **-Holcomb, it’s time to step up for Black Hoosiers-** **** Indiana Black Legislative Caucus has released a series of proposals to protect Black Hoosiers from police brutality. They’ve requested things like banning the use of chokeholds by police during arrests and instituting statewide use of body and dashboard cameras. Gov. Holcomb hasn’t committed to passing any of their proposals yet. Here’s how you can help call on Holcomb to support the IBLC’s reforms:
1. Take 90 seconds and call Gov. Holcomb’s office at 317-232-4567.
2. Tell the governor to support and stand with the Indiana Black Legislative Caucus and commit to passing every plank of their policy reforms next session.
3. Share your experience on Facebook and Twitter. Make sure to tag us!

clean_body: | | | | ---|--- | | -June 12, 2020- -The 2020 Hoosier Hospitality Dinner, TONIGHT- ** Our 2020 Virtual = is tonight at 5:30 PM EST. This is a first-of-its-kind opportunity to hear from Democrats across the country without ever leaving your couch. We’re 144 days away from the most important election of our lives. Health care, teacher pay, voting rights, and equality are all on the ballot. And we have no time to waste. The Hoosier Hospitality Dinner is your chance to come together with other Democrats and get to work. Plus, this year's keynote speaker will be DCCC chair, Illinois Congresswoman Cheri Bustos! Cheri made history as the first woman elected to Congress in her district. Now, she's joining us in the fight to take back our nation in 2020. We’ve only got a few tickets left and they’re going fast. Get yours = and we’ll see you tonight! -The INDEMS 2020 Virtual State Convention, TOMORROW- We have less than 24 hours until our 2020 Virtual State Convention starts! State Convention is where we vote on statewide candidates, start the voting process for national delegates, and ratify our 2020 platform. Plus, we’re live streaming our general session! Tune in tomorrow on at 2:30 PM EST for special messages from Linda Lawson, Dr. Woody Myers, Sen. Karen Tallian, Johnathan Weinzapfel, Joe Biden, Michigan Governor, Gretchen Whitmer, and DNC Chair, Tom Perez. Check out the 2020 program with events now until June 19th . -Volunteer Opportunity, June 15-17th- We're gearing up for our 2020 State Convention on June 13th. And we're looking for volunteers to help count state delegates' ballots on June 15th - June 17th in Indianapolis. This is a critical step in the 2020 election; it's the last step in our process to select a nominee for attorney general and kick Curtis Hill out of office. So, we need all hands on deck. = \- Virtual Caucus Party- This year, our constituency caucus are joining forces to throw a virtual after party. After the annual Hoosier Hospitality Dinner join the , , , and for their first-ever ! Grab your favorite drink, listen to a local DJ, and celebrate pride with a live virtual Drag performance by Miss Indy Pride 2019: Amelia Bearhardt. Each caucus will give updates on the crucial work they're doing around the state and talk about the importance of diversity and inclusion in our party. There will even be a chance to win prizes. All are welcome! Register now by -Holcomb, it’s time to step up for Black Hoosiers- Indiana Black Legislative Caucus has released a series of proposals to protect Black Hoosiers from police brutality. They’ve requested things like banning the use of chokeholds by police during arrests and instituting statewide use of body and dashboard cameras. Gov. Holcomb hasn’t committed to passing any of their proposals yet. Here’s how you can help call on Holcomb to support the IBLC’s reforms: 1. Take 90 seconds and call Gov. Holcomb’s office at 317-232-4567. 2. Tell the governor to support and stand with the Indiana Black Legislative Caucus and commit to passing every plank of their policy reforms next session. 3. Share your experience on Facebook and Twitter. Make sure to tag us! -Resources- Looking for ways to receive or provide COVID-19 relief? We have created a running list of across our state . Sign our petition to stand up for Black Hoosiers . Read our blog post on how to be an ally to Black and brown communities . -Save the date- Statewide: =\- June 12, 2020, Virtual Hoosier Environmental Council: \- June 12, All Day, Brown County State Park in Nashville, IN Indiana Latino Democratic Caucus, Indiana Stonewall Democrats, Indiana Young Democrats: \- June 12, 7:30-9:30PM EST, Virtual Statewide: =\- June 13, 2020, Virtual Wells County Dems: \- June 13th (2nd Saturday of every month), 119 S Johnson St., Bluffton Wayne County Dems: Monthly Meeting \- June 17 (3rd Wednesday of every month), 1010 S 9th St., Richmond Tippecanoe County Dems: \[%7B%22surface%22%3A%22page%22%2C%22mechanism%22%3A%22mainlist%22%2C%22extradata%22%3A%22%5C%22\[\]%5C%22%22%7D\]%2C%22hassource%22%3Atrue%7D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTU2YjQ1ZC1lN2FjLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JCWFwanmf2fLkorkF-KuO4hGl2p88cdcnHEMv1PQSY=&emci=297a1915-fbab-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=ae56b45d-e7ac-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=4925535 \- June 18th, 6:30-7:30 PM EDT, Virtual For more events check our events page =. | ---|--- | | = | Connect With Us | | Indiana Democratic Party** 101 W. Friend,

Wow. The Democrats have lost it.

First, they try to turn America against the police.

Then, they call to DEFUND the police (not going to happen).

And NOW, they’ve bullied television networks into taking shows about law enforcement, like Cops and Live PD, OFF the air.

The Radical Left hates America, they hate our great police, and now they even hate television!

The Liberals have gone too far in disrespecting our great law enforcement and it’s time we do something about it. We’re putting together a petition to show the Left that America will NEVER turn its back on law enforcement and to DEMAND these two great shows go back on the air.

We want to get over 1,000,000 signatures from Patriots showing their support, which is why we need your help. President Trump loves our great police and needs to know you stand with him in this fight.

name: Team Pence
subject: They wasted no time defending life. Will you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greg Pence for Congress |
body:
Our newest members of Congress didn’t waste a single day before joining the fight to defend life in Washington [ ](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=5a947334f4d44a61b6c6a419f689093c&_e=zwJOuF8qWFqE1EbnViIQZudsfzq7bJ4zJQTqEUc8Momqcg0gheuhbQa-WClq2OuUD-ONETA0qQTYOuivSUwIESufA1BdfG1Qiv3U8KKZRgWE42Pru_UY9H9UQwFdHgY0C2LHeJgFeIK8AjEqt0wDqSqY8yDL2zmu0i6UiH3G_9LW8L0CNs43J2JKGKHhkESKvqrxo37lptThTo5tBZ7q-Dtm2lPm_EwMkaH3nhyBpipv2KYk7szdV5CG9C4NCzg3G-bIy4o_HW6CBrT4e5vW4_1jEpuZAcXokToLlZ8OTEXfEf8KalH159vxr9EfO8xPqcw_6dUYsAqxQtjQfQGlDvcXoMg4AT5sgusasK2Apfs5lv6llL54ukIPiXEDu1oHMA4obAHoBAeVDzfE14buAMRBeKANMXXtf3nv7SlFifI%3D) Friend, Did you see what our two newest members of Congress – Mark Garcia (CA) and Tom Tiffany (WI) – did to mark their first day serving together in Washington?
**They both signed a petition to bring the Born-Alive Abortion Survivors Protection Act to a vote in the House. **
The Born-Alive Abortion Survivors Protection Act is gaining momentum once again, and this time, we’re stopping at nothing to overcome the Democratic majority in the House to pass this life-saving bill once and for all.
This bill isn’t even about abortion. It’s based on a simple concept — _saving the lives of babies who survive abortion attempts. _ [**Add Your Name to Support the Born-Alive Abortion Survivors Protection Act**](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=5a947334f4d44a61b6c6a419f689093c&_e=zwJOuF8qWFqE1EbnViIQZudsfzq7bJ4zJQTqEUc8Momqcg0gheuhbQa-WClq2OuUD-ONETA0qQTYOuivSUwIESufA1BdfG1Qiv3U8KKZRgWE42Pru_UY9H9UQwFdHgY0C2LHeJgFeIK8AjEqt0wDqSqY8yDL2zmu0i6UiH3G_9LW8L0CNs43J2JKGKHhkESK6o7OHfNDlH5CwgzhRcTDQfkO4QiihjGUtlB8yODdPx73iTQi33Eb4KChGryLg9JlS7vTt9FBMBzgUNzh6uvHUqmdvmV6b7jGupS8ngCpOg9bp-1x8zwjqxDoSwNIL5eV8ZYZTU3v6kTMFLXz52mXCxB7G5V1T4EaNzuC1XXiqT8UCL72PpPbXwZf32YPm66MWn37g4ivLhQ4reaaG7-TIqZl4RwLRpyevyL4sS5nb44%3D) It mandates care for babies after they have left the womb and gives every single soul a chance at life. Every single American should be able to get behind this bill, but the Democrats in the House and the Senate can’t bring themselves to support it.
**That is flat-out unacceptable.** [**Add Your Name to Support the Born-Alive Abortion Survivors Protection Act**](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=5a947334f4d44a61b6c6a419f689093c&_e=zwJOuF8qWFqE1EbnViIQZudsfzq7bJ4zJQTqEUc8Momqcg0gheuhbQa-WClq2OuUD-ONETA0qQTYOuivSUwIESufA1BdfG1Qiv3U8KKZRgWE42Pru_UY9H9UQwFdHgY0C2LHeJgFeIK8AjEqt0wDqSqY8yDL2zmu0i6UiH3G_9LW8L0CNs43J2JKGKHhkESKRF_vrnmek9DFxLaaJcgyPQ7yl5su-2Vd2tGxy5151Qvrr6a9CiWmHcemtT_lWteQT8Jk6BDEBViZqWU-R_ivC2B0sLDBu2HzFEJMeIu26udC4sD4ww0RlSU3cktlX_Kai4oMFa0QI1A-FYLVVyzNKHHf2wPk7RllZkGxnp--7WjN25aSe7cNzvc1rNhI-z4snIEf8iHGBs_KgMKLJlq6qOweBkYiF6OTGmQ1zW2hCJY%3D) Greg is proud to co-sponsor the House version of the Born-Alive Survivors Protection Act. He believes in defending the most vulnerable members of our society and treating each life with respect and dignity.
**[If you want to join Greg in standing up for life, please add your name in support of the Born-Alive Abortion Survivors Protection Act —> ](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=5a947334f4d44a61b6c6a419f689093c&_e=zwJOuF8qWFqE1EbnViIQZudsfzq7bJ4zJQTqEUc8Momqcg0gheuhbQa-WClq2OuUD-ONETA0qQTYOuivSUwIESufA1BdfG1Qiv3U8KKZRgWE42Pru_UY9H9UQwFdHgY0C2LHeJgFeIK8AjEqt0wDqSqY8yDL2zmu0i6UiH3G_9LW8L0CNs43J2JKGKHhkESKPabZJmmuSoFCcrnImrKO0fM_CKFp9pw19yyUb0b3be79k4-_QuXFRMORj3e6Ghem73Pl4qUVy3Hsys1r3v1CTkW3pw6hV2X88BjwcHKVYz1V9wdcY7oupoePdDYVopjwWPK5aBfNoTWa6u8BtWWuO_nexMKv7JtQl_bl_RkLxcPPQs5Xmw_jx-C8y7Q8-QBcQuzCzLDSEV5173zx_FDhgsqx3sc2IaaInBRFKEqONSY%3D)**

body:

| | Peter, I can't believe the general election campaign begins just one month from this Sunday. I'm so proud of our team. From speaking with thousands of Texans about health care, gun violence, and climate change to winning first place in the Texas primary, everything we've accomplished so far has me fired up for the fight ahead.

My team has been working non-stop to make sure we can take on Senator Cornyn and flip the Senate this November, and **[I need your help to keep up our momentum and reach our Sunday goal.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648901c6/7f51f7bc/4ef4175e/4ef6fecb/4180716494/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE1MzQifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-onemonthout?refcode=email_20200612.1nd__1534__&amount=10")** Unlike Sen. Cornyn, I'm not taking money from corporate PACs and I don't have Mitch McConnell's dark money network at the ready to parachute in to rescue me.

**I 'm counting on you -- because the only people I'll be working for in the Senate are hardworking Texans like yourself. So, if you can, pitch in before Sunday's deadline to help us reach our goal of bringing in 2,000 first-time donors*.** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: The second wave of hysteria, a second opinion on reopening, getting kids back to school, and ‘Peaceless’ in Seattle
body:
**[Web version](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/m/1/49109489/02-b20164-222e7f257e7b404b86d19fc88e68875d/79/40/81b98140-10e4-4ecd-9d7a-cadb4e4891e5)** After weeks of thousands protesting in the streets across the country, Democrats are now pivoting to re-focus on the coronavirus. Yes, you read that correctly. After Democratic leaders across the nation encouraged people to take to the streets, now they are trying to tell us we must return to our homes and go back to social distancing. As this week came to a close, we began to see the predictable articles from the mainstream media theorizing a second surge/wave in cases is coming soon. And where did they place the blame for this theoretical second wave? On protests? On riots? Nope, instead they tried to blame businesses re-opening too quickly. This is not only utterly ridiculous, but also illustrates the great need for the [Second Opinion Project](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTY0LTIyMmU3ZjI1N2U3YjQwNGI4NmQxOWZjODhlNjg4NzVk%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuc2Vjb25kb3BpbmlvbnByb2plY3QuY29tL3NpZ24zOTYxMDUwMD9taWQ9NDIxODImaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=woSVYuSgZTgvggTOEnaNCA). Last week, we launched the [Second Opinion Project](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTY0LTIyMmU3ZjI1N2U3YjQwNGI4NmQxOWZjODhlNjg4NzVk%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuc2Vjb25kb3BpbmlvbnByb2plY3QuY29tL3NpZ24zOTYxMDUwMD9taWQ9NDIxODImaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=_02we-vTQ0NdIrF5wQk2ug) with the stated goal of getting a second opinion on how to proceed in re-opening our country. ?The bureaucratic “experts” in Washington, and Governors around the nation, have prescribed a regimen that is destroying lives and livelihoods and it is time for the people to demand a second opinion. And the second opinions we got from doctors around the nation were clear: [The lockdowns cannot continue.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTY0LTIyMmU3ZjI1N2U3YjQwNGI4NmQxOWZjODhlNjg4NzVk%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuc2Vjb25kb3BpbmlvbnByb2plY3QuY29tL3NpZ24zOTYxMDUwMD9taWQ9NDIxODImaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=-ICD09Tn2PGgQpmCp64gfw) It's time to re-open America. Learn more and please share these videos on social media: [www.secondopinionproject.com](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTY0LTIyMmU3ZjI1N2U3YjQwNGI4NmQxOWZjODhlNjg4NzVk%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuc2Vjb25kb3BpbmlvbnByb2plY3QuY29tLz9taWQ9NDIxODImaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=-CspMPOlTX6VBMcTzmYKiQ) | |
---
On May 19, the CDC issued a new document, “Considerations for Schools,” offering what it calls “considerations for ways in which schools can help protect students, teachers, administrators, and staff and slow the spread of COVID-19.”

We have reviewed these “considerations,” and find them wholly out of touch with the way people live in the real world. They are totally unworkable, and we urge senior officials to review and revise these new CDC “considerations” to bring them into line with how real people live.

Some have expressed that these considerations are mere guidelines that carry no weight of law. While that is true – states, counties, and school districts across the country largely look at the CDC guidelines as the gold standard and many will decide not to reopen because these guidelines are wholly unworkable.

Some have suggested that we should not concern ourselves with government schools, and while we could point out all kinds of issues with the public school system, if kids do not return to school, it will hinder the ability for our country to reopen at full capacity. These guidelines will also impact whether charter schools and private schools reopen as well. We can argue the merits of public schools at another time, but for now we must get our kids back to school.

[We believe the CDC “considerations” are entirely inappropriate, and must be rewritten from top to bottom.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTY0LTIyMmU3ZjI1N2U3YjQwNGI4NmQxOWZjODhlNjg4NzVk%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90cHAtcmVzb3VyY2VzLnMzLmFtYXpvbmF3cy5jb20vZG9jdW1lbnRzLzIwMDYxMC1UUFBBLUNEQy1TY2hvb2wtQ29uc2lkZXJhdGlvbnMtTGV0dGVyLnBkZj9taWQ9NDIxODImaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=e-5tBbau1nMz3zBULtxFLw)

Standing with us are 150 doctors, 70 national groups, 240 nurses and other healthcare professionals, 330 teachers, professors, and others in the education industry, and 3,850+ concerned Americans.

**[Take a moment to read our full letter to President Trump.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTY0LTIyMmU3ZjI1N2U3YjQwNGI4NmQxOWZjODhlNjg4NzVk%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90cHAtcmVzb3VyY2VzLnMzLmFtYXpvbmF3cy5jb20vZG9jdW1lbnRzLzIwMDYxMC1UUFBBLUNEQy1TY2hvb2wtQ29uc2lkZXJhdGlvbnMtTGV0dGVyLnBkZj9taWQ9NDIxODImaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=RnpwkF4zQJK-s17n2v3qeA)**
|
---
ICYMI: Our Honorary Chair [Jenny Beth Martin joined Greta Wall on OANN](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTY0LTIyMmU3ZjI1N2U3YjQwNGI4NmQxOWZjODhlNjg4NzVk%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cub2Fubi5jb20vd2FsbC10by13YWxsLXRlYS1wYXJ0eS1wYXRyaW90cy1jby1mb3VuZGVyLW9uLXByb3Rlc3RlcnMtdnMtcmlvdGVycy8_bWlkPTQyMTgyJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=p0_9BuJQeQSJpTvp4gSR8g) to discuss the difference between protests protected by the First Amendment and criminal riots.

[ ](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTY0LTIyMmU3ZjI1N2U3YjQwNGI4NmQxOWZjODhlNjg4NzVk%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cub2Fubi5jb20vd2FsbC10by13YWxsLXRlYS1wYXJ0eS1wYXRyaW90cy1jby1mb3VuZGVyLW9uLXByb3Rlc3RlcnMtdnMtcmlvdGVycy8_bWlkPTQyMTgyJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=2sJb9eYTOYrvCo5RQmv2Nw)

**[Wall To Wall: Tea Party Patriots Co-Founder On Protesters Vs. Rioters](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTY0LTIyMmU3ZjI1N2U3YjQwNGI4NmQxOWZjODhlNjg4NzVk%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AOA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cub2Fubi5jb20vd2FsbC10by13YWxsLXRlYS1wYXJ0eS1wYXRyaW90cy1jby1mb3VuZGVyLW9uLXByb3Rlc3RlcnMtdnMtcmlvdGVycy8_bWlkPTQyMTgyJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=pc8M0V9oZH5TwdApFdQBaA)**
Rioters and looters are hurting the reputation and messaging of peaceful protesters in the wake of George Floyd’s death.
