In the span of 3 weeks, we have gone from unnecessary government lockdowns to complete anarchy...or at least that's the case in Seattle's new Capitol Hill Autonomous Zone.

Earlier this week radical Antifa members took advantage of police being told to abandon a precinct and took over a six-block area of downtown Seattle. They quickly transformed it into what they called an “autonomous zone,” with hopes to show the world “what a community can look like without police.”

So, what were the results?

A "warlord" quickly took over the area, walls were built, and armed guards were posted at the perimeter. Peaceful “progressivism” in action!

The situation has been allowed to devolve because the Mayor of Seattle and the Governor of Washington refuse to act to restore order. Instead of protecting citizens and calling out radicals, they have called the autonomous zone “patriotic” and said it “resembles a block party.”

A truly astonishing display of Democratic “leadership” in action, and a preview of what the rest of the country will look like if leftists gain more power.
|
---
As you probably know, America’s enemies are overjoyed at the division our nation faces right now. It is not impossible that they would seek to foment and escalate that division in an effort to further damage our country. Therefore, it would be wise for all of us to be discerning in what we share online. Do some research to make sure that what we are all sharing is accurate, and not something cooked up by our enemies. This is especially true for the most incendiary items that we come across. It doesn’t hurt us to double check before we share, but it could stop us from sharing something that further deteriorates our unity as a nation.

clean_body: After weeks of thousands protesting in the streets across the country, Democrats are now pivoting to re-focus on the coronavirus. Yes, you read that correctly. After Democratic leaders across the nation encouraged people to take to the streets, now they are trying to tell us we must return to our homes and go back to social distancing. As this week came to a close, we began to see the predictable articles from the mainstream media theorizing a second surge/wave in cases is coming soon. And where did they place the blame for this theoretical second wave? On protests? On riots? Nope, instead they tried to blame businesses re-opening too quickly. This is not only utterly ridiculous, but also illustrates the great need for the . Last week, we launched the with the stated goal of getting a second opinion on how to proceed in re-opening our country. ?The bureaucratic “experts” in Washington, and Governors around the nation, have prescribed a regimen that is destroying lives and livelihoods and it is time for the people to demand a second opinion. And the second opinions we got from doctors around the nation were clear: It's time to re-open America. Learn more and please share these videos on social media: | | On May 19, the CDC issued a new document, “Considerations for Schools,” offering what it calls “considerations for ways in which schools can help protect students, teachers, administrators, and staff and slow the spread of COVID-19.” We have reviewed these “considerations,” and find them wholly out of touch with the way people live in the real world. They are totally unworkable, and we urge senior officials to review and revise these new CDC “considerations” to bring them into line with how real people live. Some have expressed that these considerations are mere guidelines that carry no weight of law. While that is true – states, counties, and school districts across the country largely look at the CDC guidelines as the gold standard and many will decide not to reopen because these guidelines are wholly unworkable. Some have suggested that we should not concern ourselves with government schools, and while we could point out all kinds of issues with the public school system, if kids do not return to school, it will hinder the ability for our country to reopen at full capacity. These guidelines will also impact whether charter schools and private schools reopen as well. We can argue the merits of public schools at another time, but for now we must get our kids back to school. name: Holcomb Crew
subject: you’re invited - don’t miss out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
Don’t miss out on Governor Holcomb’s speech laying out his vision for the next four years. | | |
---|---|---
friend,

We’ve got great news.

You’re invited to the 2020 Indiana Republican State Convention!

**Like a lot of events, the convention is going to be a little bit different this year.**

_We wish we could all gather in-person to hear from Governor Holcomb and Lt. Governor Crouch, but the COVID-19 pandemic has forced the convention to be entirely virtual._

But don’t worry — you can still join us via livestream or local TV and hear Eric’s keynote address!
[**Get the details on the 2020 convention**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=ba0f3deb294146feaf9e539a4c7a9db4&_e=_F_O6ofO1pdv93OF_RI3Jh5dIu2qO-P3WVW70Rd4Z3akNj8yKDb0ld-tECDRe0iCl-UGuDqyhwmbUeR1yFUsT1I1kqW0B0ph7KMFu06KyIEhtu5jmHsCUu3hYcIDqN9UZTQPKGkwQc1ZSP_rNP7j5AjjsuRsTx39Wh7ILAj8TcUM89mh6wa9i0TUvGraooBS11XLVExYncVUgF7lOEMvkNK-xfybtbMHX4bnusRPhR_lEyG0E7TQyrk8a7IwR-ZCJeSRkJViiT8Jhht-kUq3MpPe1MoMmIabzLFqN3j_s-EYnTa04zE6WF76EcIqKdD5uRwNzJ1XQ526ewKm5e4VG_Ne1Iu5kI0xgayM5lWhnfhJ_9F7VVaSf5aO1PoCl8W_Lclmi98LkWtLaVrJbriATg%3D%3D)
He’s going to lay out his vision for the next four years and present his plan on how we will continue to get back on track, restore our economy, and build One Indiana — **together.**

You can find all the most important details below:
* **When:** June 18, 5:30 - 7:00 PM EST
* **How you can watch it live:** You can find the convention live on WISH-TV or any of its statewide broadcast partners. It will also be live-streamed at **[this link.](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=ba0f3deb294146feaf9e539a4c7a9db4&_e=_F_O6ofO1pdv93OF_RI3Jh5dIu2qO-P3WVW70Rd4Z3akNj8yKDb0ld-tECDRe0iCl-UGuDqyhwmbUeR1yFUsT1I1kqW0B0ph7KMFu06KyIEhtu5jmHsCUu3hYcIDqN9UZTQPKGkwQc1ZSP_rNP7j5AjjsuRsTx39Wh7ILAj8TcUM89mh6wa9i0TUvGraooBSXOeL5rJwMtspbffavlx3MdnPjaNY0PbIIN-2ftTDnHiU2VngSMkwAjLbOSN63OIUKWgmumssTYbXD7F0TW9GOnNyeP0-LD3ciCDdF0f62rVWelEPQe7nThT2GVU79ZAQbwmHFJLGhg5AH4DRkbkDidTrHsUtN3Kyqbl9eEfIN4axZwkMaiia8ARpJ68yhxzYIyqvEvFvH6NBiCNmXaaWDQ%3D%3D)**
* **Who’s speaking:** Governor Eric Holcomb, Lieutenant Governor Suzanne Crouch, and the candidates for attorney general

We hope that you join our crew and watch Governor Holcomb lay out his vision — we know that he wants as many Hoosiers to hear what he has to say as possible, and it would mean a lot to him if you watched his speech.

If you want more information on the 2020 confirmation, you can follow **[this link.](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=ba0f3deb294146feaf9e539a4c7a9db4&_e=_F_O6ofO1pdv93OF_RI3Jh5dIu2qO-P3WVW70Rd4Z3akNj8yKDb0ld-tECDRe0iCl-UGuDqyhwmbUeR1yFUsT1I1kqW0B0ph7KMFu06KyIEhtu5jmHsCUu3hYcIDqN9UZTQPKGkwQc1ZSP_rNP7j5AjjsuRsTx39Wh7ILAj8TcUM89mh6wa9i0TUvGraooBS8fvzZhFvfzCvF_V9v-fHy1FlsHTNkk_mBwOT6ULMffm6RV0cSgzVuPAsjOr7qyzA8AtFdTxaWtpfhbKhdw_ee2VoawOr7CHTUcLfMVVB8-EZ6QpGTCmzqOue7GOI_7-vDz19-Prea20rtvBR0SGLTlHGIX_Pd8j36d5RIsRcZn2DDVA9uN5K5rT-bf4a9zoZ6nV6Vm9VoHx4MdjbZcgluA%3D%3D)**

Sincerely,

Holcomb Crew

clean_body: | Look, the long and the short of it is that Democrats have virtually no chance to take back the Senate OR the White House if we lose in Minnesota. That puts a lot of pressure on our campaign to succeed. But I’m confident we can. The only problem is that my team is telling me we are not on track to reach our critical fundraising goal before the FEC deadline on June 30. So, I told them I’d reach out to our core group of supporters (AKA you!). I’m personally asking you to contribute toward our FEC goal before we tally up our numbers again in a few short days. It’s so important that we get back on track for the quarter and muster the resources to stop Republicans from flipping our state red. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = I can’t tell you how many good ideas I’ve seen die in Washington. And I’ve had enough of corporate interests and right-wing billionaires calling the shots. I know we have what it takes to flip the Senate, take back the White House, and get our government back to working for the people again. But this work will require the support of folks like you every step of the way. I can’t do this alone. I need you with me. If you can, please pitch in a donation to help us get back on track as we work to keep Minnesota blue and save one of our only chances of taking power back in Washington. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you for all you do. — Tina Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota Tina Smith for Minnesota PO Box 14362 St. Paul, MN 55114 United States Contributions or gifts to Tina Smith for Minnesota are not tax-deductible.

name: =?utf-8?B?TGluZGEgU8OhbmNoZXo=?=
subject: The Pandemic Heroes Compensation Act 🖊️
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand with Sánchez |
body:
>From health care professionals to grocery store workers, from truck drivers to farmers, and so many more, essential workers have effectively kept our country running during the COVID-19 health crisis.

That's why it's critical that we set up a safety net for frontline workers that will help cover coronavirus-related expenses. Thankfully, the House has passed The Pandemic Heroes Compensation Act, which ensures frontline workers and their families will receive proper compensation for injuries, illness, and death as a result of COVID-19.

Now, we just need the Senate to pass it. That means we need to show Senators just how much widespread support this legislation has with the American public. Can I count on you to sign on as a citizen co-sponsor of the Pandemic Heroes Compensation Act?

I'm doing everything in my power to help the heroes working on the frontlines of the COVID-19 health crisis. Last month, I introduced a tax credit bill to help cover costs faced by essential workers. I'm proud to say this bill was included in the Pandemic Heroes Compensation Act.

While it's up to the Senate to get this Act passed, you can help by signing your name in support.

Stand up for our Pandemic Heroes | SIGN YOUR NAME>>

Thank you,

-- Linda Sánchez

----------------------------------------
| Paid for by Stand with Sánchez |
----------------------------------------

Stand with Sánchez
415 New Jersey Avenue, SE - Unit 1
Washington DC 20003 United States

name: James Mackler
subject: Your Constitutional Right
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James Mackler for U
body:
To vote freely and safely
|
---
[ ](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa12a/18d6a294/4cab27dc/26d7fa34/2770318353/VEsH/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://www.jamesmackler.com/")

| | Today, more Tennesseans have COVID-19 than ever before. Hospitalizations are on the rise. And while social distancing helped flatten the curve, it's clear the pandemic is still with us and will continue to be in the months ahead. Knowing this, we must act to ensure all voters can safely cast ballots in our upcoming elections, including guaranteeing all voters are able to vote-by-mail from the safety of their own home. Otherwise, we could run into the same issues Georgia faced during their primary election this week: long and crowded lines, multi-hour wait times, and issues with voting machines. [_**I 've teamed up with End Citizens United and Let America Vote to gather 100,000 signatures from grassroots activists demanding all voters be eligible to vote-by-mail before November.**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa12a/18d6a294/4cab27dc/26d7fa35/2770318353/VEsE/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.jamesmackler.com/200612_b") | | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa12a/18d6a294/4cab27dc/26d7fa35/2770318353/VEsF/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.jamesmackler.com/200612_b")
---
There's momentum to make vote-by-mail happen in Tennessee, but it's not all good news. While a judge recently ruled all 4.1 million Tennessee voters be permitted to vote-by-mail this election, state officials are dragging their feet and wasting time needed to widely implement vote-by-mail for all voters by creating confusing forms and offering voters misleading information.
**Any opposition to vote-by-mail efforts this year poses a serious threat to the health of Tennesseans and threatens the integrity of our elections.**
[_**Add your name to mine and tell Congress to institute a NATIONWIDE vote-by-mail option before the upcoming election.**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa12a/18d6a294/4cab27dc/26d7fa35/2770318353/VEsC/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.jamesmackler.com/200612_b")
Improving voter participation isn't a new issue in Tennessee as our state ranks so low in turnout election after election. The need for change has been exacerbated by the pandemic and doing nothing will disenfranchise and silence Tennesseans.
**Protecting voting rights isn 't about politics. _It 's about our _democracy__.**
I've defended the Constitution on the battlefield and in the courtroom, and we must act to defend our democracy during this pandemic.
[_**We need 100,000 grassroots supporters to sign our petition and call on Congress to guarantee all voters be able to vote-by-mail before November to make sure no one has to risk their health to cast their ballot. Add your name today ->**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa12a/18d6a294/4cab27dc/26d7fa35/2770318353/VEsD/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.jamesmackler.com/200612_b")
In service,
James

|
---
| | Paid for by James Mackler for U.S. Senate
---
James Mackler is a member of the Tennessee National Guard and a former member of the U.S. Army. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Tennessee National Guard, the Department of the Army, or the Department of Defense. This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com). [Click here to unsubscribe](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa12a/18d6a294/4cab27dc/26d7fa32/2770318353/VEsA/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.jamesmackler.com/unsubscribe")

body:

We want to thank you, again, for signing up for updates from Jim and the team.
If you missed Jim’s recent email, this is what you need to know:
Jim Oberweis is exactly the experienced businessman and fiscal hawk we need to stand up to runaway tax-and-spend ideology in Washington and bridge the partisan divide to rebuild our economy yet again as we navigate these challenging times.
**He’s lived the American Dream, and he has dedicated his life to making certain that each of us, our children, and our grandchildren have the opportunity to do the same!**
You’re now subscribed to receive our regular email updates. To make sure you don't miss a thing, we’d also encourage you to follow what we’re up to on social media: **[Visit and ‘Like’ Jim’s campaign Facebook page](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b49153ac4d1237a53a89ac0c84d83476/34533/d7fa0debba41d4a7/3205f32e67cf33c1c3d6b838967d376c/34533)**
**[Visit and ‘Follow’ Jim on Twitter](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b49153ac4d1237a53a89ac0c84d83476/34533/d7fa0debba41d4a7/f1255c4ef5c5770fc3d6b838967d376c/34533)** Following Jim’s campaign on social media is a great way to stay up on all the latest news in this race, and to help build his online following by sharing posts.
If you’d like to learn more about Jim’s background, positions on key issues, or other info on our campaign, you can visit his campaign website **[here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b49153ac4d1237a53a89ac0c84d83476/34533/d7fa0debba41d4a7/009f36324343c7d5c3d6b838967d376c/34533)**.
\- Team Oberweis
_P.S. name: Jamal Raad
subject: Dear Mitch McConnell, Nancy Pelosi, Chuck Schumer, and Kevin McCarthy:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
This is a first step.
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/308?t=2&akid=503%2E53494%2E7SV5ed) Friend, It's time congressional Democrats start to make noise about the climate crisis. A few days ago, 57 members of Congress sent a letter to congressional leadership urging them to prioritize clean energy in upcoming relief bills: "As Congress develops forward-looking policies to rebuild the American jobs market and economy, we urge you to prioritize a robust clean energy recovery plan," they wrote to Senate Majority Leader McConnell, Speaker Pelosi, Senate Minority Leader Schumer, and House Minority Leader McCarthy. "We must work to recreate an economy that's stronger, cleaner, and more inclusive." Sound familiar? It's clear: The pressure we're putting on Congress is _working_. We have momentum on our side, so we can't let up now. | **So we want to hear from you: Do you support congressional Democrats prioritizing climate in the next relief bill?** Yes
No

---
The two big relief packages passed by the House so far -- the CARES Act and the HEROES Act -- failed to recognize the urgency of addressing the climate crisis. Massive as they were, neither package provided support for clean energy, a sector that shed some 600,000 jobs in the first two months of the pandemic alone.
But now, we're seeing newfound energy among Democrats to prioritize clean energy investment. Data for Progress polling shows strong public support for the ideas in our Clean Jumpstart Plan, a $1.5 trillion investment in the clean energy economy.
The story of America's economic recovery is just beginning. Public pressure in the coming weeks and months from people like you will encourage Congress to jumpstart the clean energy economy and put millions of Americans back to work.
I'd like to thank Representative Paul Tonko and Senator Martin Heinrich for leading the charge to urge congressional leaders to prioritize clean energy -- and I commend the dozens of other senators and representatives who signed on in support.
**[Now it's time to do our part and add our voices to theirs: Click here to tell House Democrats that you support prioritizing clean energy investment in upcoming relief legislation.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/377?t=4&akid=503%2E53494%2E7SV5ed)**
Thanks,
Jamal Raad
Co-Founder and Campaign Director, Evergreen Action
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](https://act.evergreenaction.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=503%2E53494%2E7SV5ed). Contributions or gifts to EVERGREEN ACTION are not tax deductible. | PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
---

name: Laura Loomer
subject: ISIS Terrorist kills 49
body:
Four years ago today, ISIS terrorist Omar Mateen gunned down 49 people in the Pulse Night Club in Orlando, Florida.
| | | [](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-379621-894148-5039740-8f64871a05-5c3e9e953d)
Patriot,

[](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-379621-894148-5039739-eabe516cbb-5c3e9e953d) Four years ago today, ISIS terrorist Omar Mateen gunned down 49 people in the Pulse Night Club in Orlando, Florida.

Following the terrorist attack, the media and Democrat politicians labeled it a hate crime against the LGBTQ community and immediately began the call to restrict our Second Amendment rights.

But their narrative was misleading.

After failing to gain entry to Disney World, Mateen’s original target, he chose Pulse nightclub as the location of his terrorist attack.

The Islamic terrorist was outraged by the killing of ISIS leader Abu Waheeb a month earlier, which is why he stormed the gay nightclub, massacring 49 people, holding others hostage, while pledging allegiance to ISIS.

But democrats still deny it was an act of Islamic terrorism to this day.

Ilhan Omar posted on Twitter, **"Let’s remember the attack for what it was: a hate crime against the LGBTQIA+ community."**

Just hours ago, Nancy Pelosi called it a **"shocking act of hatred."**

Other Democrats like my opponent Lois Frankel are refusing to admit this was an act of Islamic terrorism, and are instead attacking law abiding gun owners.

Islamic Terrorism doesn’t fit the narrative of Democrats in this critical election year. Their "hate America" agenda bolsters terrorists and some Democrats like Ilhan Omar and Rashida Tlaib work directly with groups that are officially designated as terrorist organizations. Ilhan Omar once advocated for nine men in her district who joined ISIS, asking a judge to lessen their sentencing.

**This is why I’m headed to Washington.[And I need your help to get there.](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-379621-894148-5039739-eabe516cbb-5c3e9e953d)**

Help me honor the American lives lost to Islamic Terrorism by allowing me to actively fight against those who would go so far as to change the narrative to fit their agenda.

I have to go back to Ilhan Omar’s quote, "Let’s remember the attack for what it was . . . "

That’s a shameful, outrageous lie!

FOURTY-NINE lives were lost on this day four years ago. FOURTY-NINE men and women were stalked and many were shot at point blank range by an ISIS TERRORIST.

**Let’s not forget the attack for what it was . . . ISLAMIC TERRORISM.**

[Help me get to Washington so that next year, on the fifth anniversary of this attack, I can remind Ilhan Omar and **hand her the names of the men and women killed by an ISIS terrorist.**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-379621-894148-5039739-eabe516cbb-5c3e9e953d)

Thank you again for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

[](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-379621-894148-5039739-eabe516cbb-5c3e9e953d)

Islamic Terrorism doesn’t fit the narrative of Democrats in this critical election year. Their "hate America" agenda bolsters terrorists and some Democrats like Ilhan Omar and Rashida Tlaib work directly with groups that are officially designated as terrorist organizations. Ilhan Omar once advocated for nine men in her district who joined ISIS, asking a judge to lessen their sentencing. This is why I’m headed to Washington. Help me honor the American lives lost to Islamic Terrorism by allowing me to actively fight against those who would go so far as to change the narrative to fit their agenda. I have to go back to Ilhan Omar’s quote, "Let’s remember the attack for what it was . . . " That’s a shameful, outrageous lie! FOURTY-NINE lives were lost on this day four years ago. FOURTY-NINE men and women were stalked and many were shot at point blank range by an ISIS TERRORIST. Let’s not forget the attack for what it was . . . ISLAMIC TERRORISM. Thank you again for all that you do. Respectfully, Laura Loomer Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. name: Kathy Manning
subject: Change is long overdue
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
That's why I'm supporting the Justice in Policing Act. Will you join me?
|
---

| | Systemic racism affects every aspect of life from law enforcement, to health care, housing, and education. We've seen protests arise all over the country in the wake of the brutal murders of George Floyd, Ahmaud Arbery and Breonna Taylor. That's important -- we must all take action to confront racism head on. We must also build on these protests by making policy reforms that end practices that contribute to institutional racism. **For that reason, I 'm encouraged that congressional Democrats are taking action to end police brutality by introducing the Justice in Policing Act.** [_**Now, Mitch McConnell must take action in the Senate. Please sign our emergency petition and demand McConnell bring up the Justice in Policing Act for a vote.**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d325/3d199a51/2f438402/7364ca34/2565929135/VEsH/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/e200611pet_b") This important piece of legislation would:
* Ban chokeholds
* Overhaul police training standards
* Bolster oversight and accountability for police officers and departments
* Limit military-grade weapons in police departments
* Combat racial profiling

**[_TELL MCCONNELL TO TAKE ACTION TO END POLICE BRUTALITY ->_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d325/3d199a51/2f438402/7364ca34/2565929135/VEsE/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/e200611pet_b")** Recently, I signed a pledge declaring that racism has no place in North Carolina's 6th District or anywhere in our country, and I'm proud to support Democrats' efforts to put an end to police brutality as an important first step in that fight. We must _all_ be allies in this fight. [_**So I 'm asking: Will you sign our emergency petition and tell McConnell to bring up the Justice in Policing Act for a vote in the Senate?**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d325/3d199a51/2f438402/7364ca34/2565929135/VEsF/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/e200611pet_b") Thank you, Kathy |
---
| | Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
---

---

name: Bill Olson
subject: Defunding the Police is Insane
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Bill Olson for Congress

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=g17s5Qylg_6OuRU&b=i1VH67.yZblW0KCaX_.8YQ

Hi Peter,

My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet running to take back a Swing district- Florida’s 9th District, currently held by embattled liberal Democrat Darren Soto.

I've seen things in our country over the last two weeks that I never thought I'd see. The left’s fear that Trump is Hitler has made them all Stalin and they are utterly blind to it!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=g17s5Qylg_6OuRU&b=i1VH67.yZblW0KCaX_.8YQ

Following the tragic death of George Floyd in Minneapolis, the Left- led by domestic terrorism organization Antifa- engaged in riots in dozens of American cities (including some in Florida).

These riots were destructive and lethal. They resulted in burning hundreds of buildings, homes and businesses- largely in black neighborhoods. Over 150 people died, including two dozen police officers. Over 100 more officers were hospitalized with wounds.

The attacks were brutal and barbaric.

Police are looking for four men who assaulted NYPD cops in two separate Manhattan incidents amid the George Floyd protests this week — including one suspect who threw a brick at a lieutenant and another who tossed a fire extinguisher at a cop.

The NYPD said the lieutenant and another officer were trying to arrest protesters Sunday around 10:30 p.m. outside the Strand Bookstore, two blocks from Union Square, when two men threw a brick at the lieutenant and hit the second officer with a stick, cellphone video shows.

Lt. Jorge Rodriguez told NBC 4 News on Tuesday that he "felt like I got shot.”

Another cop was lit on fire by rioters. Three black cops were killed by rioters, which I guess means that black lives really didn't matter to the rioters.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=g17s5Qylg_6OuRU&b=i1VH67.yZblW0KCaX_.8YQ

So you see how the radical Left values the police. Basically, they want the police to enforce their draconian Socialist edicts and take on all the risk to their lives and families... and then defund them.

That's right. The new call from the radical Left- and their Democrat allies in Congress- is to defund the police. Some, in certain cities like Minneapolis, don't just want to reduce the police funding- they want to do away with the police entirely!

Democratic Rep. Ilhan Omar went beyond calls to defund the police following the death of George Floyd, instead calling for dismantling the Minneapolis Police Department because it is “rotten to the root.”

Protesters and members of Black Lives Matter have chanted “defund the police” during the nationwide demonstrations over Floyd’s death on May 25.

“We need to completely dismantle the Minneapolis Police Department. Because here’s the thing, there’s a cancer,” she said, continuing that amputation is needed so it doesn’t spread.

“The Minneapolis Police Department is rotten to the root, and so when we dismantle it, we get rid of that cancer, and we allow for something beautiful to rise, and that reimagining allows us to figure out what public safety looks like for us,” Omar, a first-term congresswoman, said.

It is important to understand, that any policy promoted by Ilhan Omar is NOT, in general, a policy that would benefit America. She's a dangerous traitor.

But this particular reckless policy- defunding or doing away with the police- is a critical error that would destroy society as we know it.

Think about it for a moment. If your daughter is raped, who would you call? A municipal "conflict negotiator"?

If someone broke into your home with a knife, will you call a "community healer"?

Recently, an "expert" guest on CNN said that if you're worried about your safety, that's just "white privilege".

Really? These people are nuts!

I tell you what, if you're in one of these cities, buy your guns now! Because your safety is in danger with Democrat leadership like this.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=g17s5Qylg_6OuRU&b=i1VH67.yZblW0KCaX_.8YQ

Are you angry yet? Are you concerned for your fellow citizens who want to be safe?

I say, ENOUGH! I will stand for the defenseless, even as the Democrats try to destroy our civilization in the name of political correctness.

I stand with the brave police and first responders! I think those who have laid the most on the line for our country and its citizens- whose who have taken an Oath to defend the Constitution- are the ones best fit to defend our Constitution in Congress.

Me, I’m not a career politician. I don't have fancy refrigerators full of $15 designer ice cream, like Nancy Pelosi. And I can't afford my own private security like the limousine liberals do!

I earned my education in the Cold War frontiers of Germany and South Korea, as well as the battlefields of Kuwait, Iraq, and Afghanistan. That's why I'm 100% behind the President's "America First" policies!

Let's be clear- there is NO Republican win in 2020 without Florida.

Florida is so pivotal. The electoral votes, along with so many Republican-leaning and swing congressional districts, make this state of paramount importance. Plus, it's now President Trump's home state!

Perhaps you agree with me, that we need more Bible, more Constitution, more safety- and less crazy liberal Democrats like Darren Soto.

If so, then I need your help!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=g17s5Qylg_6OuRU&b=i1VH67.yZblW0KCaX_.8YQ

Darren Soto will have all of Nancy Pelosi's Swamp money. That's why I need your help today- to replace Darren Soto, and support the President!

Can you help me?

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=g17s5Qylg_6OuRU&b=i1VH67.yZblW0KCaX_.8YQ

Can I count on you for a donation

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=g17s5Qylg_6OuRU&b=i1VH67.yZblW0KCaX_.8YQ
of $15, $35, $60, $250, $500, $1000.... all the way to the Federal maximum donation of $2800 per individual, $5600 per couple? I need whatever you can send so we can defeat socialist Darren Soto!

The Democrats are going to lose this year - with your help!

Let's get this done!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=g17s5Qylg_6OuRU&b=i1VH67.yZblW0KCaX_.8YQ

Bill Olson

Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars

Supports President Trump

Not a Career Politician

Hard Core Conservative Fighter

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=g17s5Qylg_6OuRU&b=i1VH67.yZblW0KCaX_.8YQ

P.S. I really need your help today

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=g17s5Qylg_6OuRU&b=i1VH67.yZblW0KCaX_.8YQ
, so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - WITH YOUR HELP!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=g17s5Qylg_6OuRU&b=i1VH67.yZblW0KCaX_.8YQ
Thank you and God bless America! - Bill.

PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS

Bill Olson is a retired member of the United States Army. Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense.

5 Halifax Ct
Marlton NJ 08053

name: Kathy Manning
subject: 1OO,OOO SIGNATURES NEEDED:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
Our democracy is at risk.
|
---

| | In April, Wisconsin went ahead with in-person voting for its primary election. As a result, counties with a higher voting concentration saw higher rates of positive coronavirus tests.

And just _this week_ , primary voters in Georgia experienced long lines, broken machines, and many have been unable to exercise their constitutional right to vote. **We can 't allow for that to happen on a national scale. We need to institute a universal vote-by-mail option before the November general election.** **100,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED:
[_Add your name now ->_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d327/3d199a51/2f40319b/7364ca2d/68065730/VEsH/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/e200602_a")** Our government needs to work for everyone. But right now, Washington is broken. And there are two major contributing factors: _**dark money in politics and rampant voter suppression.**_ I'm proud to be endorsed by End Citizens United and Let America Vote, two organizations that are fighting to take big money out of politics and protect Americans' constitutional right to vote. Their efforts are more vital than ever as the coronavirus threatens both Americans' health and the integrity of our democracy. [_**Together, we 're teaming up to demand that Congress provide a universal, no-excuse vote-by-mail option before November, but we need 100,000 grassroots supporters to join us. Will you sign our petition?**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d327/3d199a51/2f40319b/7364ca2d/68065730/VEsE/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/e200602_a") Thank you, Kathy |
---

---

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Five Stories President Trump Doesn’t Want You to Miss
body:
Here’s What President Trump Is Doing to Help Underserved Communities, Minority Businesses | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1a93c08e80&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **_FIVE STORIES PRESIDENT TRUMP DOESN'T WANT YOU TO MISS_**
---
| | | [Here’s What President Trump Is Doing to Help Underserved Communities, Minority Businesses](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0ebf971a24&e=3ee4985eea)
— _Fort Worth Star-Telegram_
“I joined the president Thursday in Dallas as he hosted a roundtable at a church. Included in the discussion were faith and community leaders and small-business owners who discussed solutions to historic economic, health, and justice disparities in American communities,” writes Ashley Bell of the White House Opportunity & Revitalization Council.

**🇺🇸 President Trump:** [I will never stop fighting for forgotten Americans](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=85ac312238&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**Lawless in Seattle: City Lets Anarchists Seize Downtown Blocks**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8ce4ba3f19&e=3ee4985eea)
— _New York Post_
“Even for 2020, events in Seattle are bizarre: Armed radicals have taken over six blocks downtown, with the de facto blessing of city officials,” the New York Post editorial board writes. “This has nothing to do with any legitimate protest”—it’s a violent gang power grab, encouraged by the mayor’s appalling weakness.
---
|
---
| [**No Police = No Opportunity. Without Law Enforcement You'll Have This**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6e83abdf81&e=3ee4985eea)
—Fox News
“Proponents of ‘defunding’ the police claim to be seeking justice and equality for minority communities. It’s the right goal, but the approach risks moving our country in the opposite direction,” Brian Brenberg writes. “Economic opportunity requires the peace and security that effective law enforcement provides.”

🎬 **President Trump:** [We will not defund, dismantle, or disband our police](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f3e811a4e6&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| **[Cancel Cancel Culture](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=582d4e2e13&e=3ee4985eea)**
— _National Review_
“We would prefer that people be treated with grace rather than opportunistic cruelty and with charity rather than pettiness,” the National Review editorial board writes. “We worry about the consequences of cancel culture. But we are much more intensely ashamed of it and what it says about the current state of the American heart.”
---
|
---
| [**'Going Out of Business' in Minneapolis**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=90848c7157&e=3ee4985eea)
— _Townhall_
“Minneapolis was a beautiful city with a promising future and unlimited potential. Gateway to the ‘Land of 10,000 Lakes.’ Home of the Mall of America and a top tourist destination for sports fans, families, and college students. Notice I say was,” Tom Tradup writes. “Because over the past two weeks Minneapolis has pretty much hung out the ‘Going Out Of Business’ sign on the outskirts of town.”

**MORE:** [Factory damaged in riots will leave Minneapolis, owner says](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=367f371128&e=3ee4985eea)

---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9a1ca23f5d&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=11375d62f2&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=904532ba18)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

| | Team — as Michael heads back to Washington next week to fight for COVID-19 relief, public lands protections, and criminal justice reform, he’s looking for input from top supporters like you.

Michael wants to connect with each of you in person, but these aren’t normal times. And unprecedented times call for innovative measures. We’ve been holding virtual town halls and conference calls — and we’re sending out surveys like this one.

[As communities continue to reopen their economies, while also working to keep workers and families safe, we want to hear from you.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17850875/208526230/-707691800?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDVkNmNjYS0wZGFkLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gQtDrGU36amUuZcfCSfWx1HA8C2BQ6_uXgkBvJx_ZA8=&emci=dcae97c1-f9ac-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=1d5d6cca-0dad-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=1295540)

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Housing for families in need
body:
Your RI COVID-19 News Update
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
Right now, there are many housing-insecure Rhode Islanders that need a safe place to stay. Homelessness is always devastating, but all the more so during a global pandemic. My team has been working around the clock to provide support to our most vulnerable during this time.
One of the ways we're doing that is by providing rental assistance to as many housing-insecure Rhode Islanders as we can. Unfortunately, despite the fact that a majority of their rent is guaranteed by the state each month, Rhode Islanders with housing vouchers often struggle to find landlords who are willing to rent to them. That's always wrong, but it's especially dangerous now.
Earlier this week, we launched the Housing Now! campaign in partnership with the United Way and the Rhode Island Realtor's Association. We are challenging Rhode Island landlords to pledge at least 100 rental units by July 1. To support this initiative, we're going to provide financial incentives to landlords that rent units to households experiencing homelessness. United Way is facilitating this program and will help match renters and landlords, so all landlords need to do is call 211 today.
This is a real opportunity for landlords to do the right thing and help their fellow Rhode Islanders, but also get some economic security during these unprecedented times.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wETZDyaqGy7z6her7OwQotbOi2m7OXImzsUvcIqiyDtvWg3WXF7UnFG7QP4pOP2MUcdVclWb7da2teoQ0qqloF7LBu7-Xrh1O3mzdZ8hXVLJ0BDstQ_pQVivjnvRsSRr0lwhNGPwrOQp1okWYqHrCvRtRDirGbzDHYvkUF8ynl9Fo9T4cIHa_WiHIvSTU3JOekjGG5SUxm0=&c=OKUz4ozz0G1y70VXP5ppWovXLliSC6wJuB8to0uT_UqI6WLFgKQNmw==&ch=_wsfQI3GGyY52LMzDm1c2tbhdIjJfI6skGwXH2IN3-iVX6zKvl41Wg==)
---
| I also want to take a moment to address testing. Right now, Rhode Island runs more COVID-19 tests per capita than any other state. The main focus of our testing strategy has been--and will continue to be--testing people with symptoms. But it's also important that we test people who are asymptomatic--especially because they may have the virus and not be exhibiting symptoms yet. We have the capacity to run 900 of these asymptomatic tests a day, but we've only been averaging about half of that so far. I'm not satisfied with those numbers. We need to get more people tested so we can get better information about this virus and how it's affecting our communities. Today, I'm announcing that we're expanding our asymptomatic testing program to include restaurant workers and bus drivers.
If you fall into one of these categories, you can get tested by going to [portal.ri.gov](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wETZDyaqGy7z6her7OwQotbOi2m7OXImzsUvcIqiyDtvWg3WXF7UnJLCoX5sZRE2C5C8ULYKBl3y5mylVEBaD1l_QnKEPYJ-kmnVDZa6TiPoi55Fyi7izOBhojD8FiF4Z8rKL7hIqGY=&c=OKUz4ozz0G1y70VXP5ppWovXLliSC6wJuB8to0uT_UqI6WLFgKQNmw==&ch=_wsfQI3GGyY52LMzDm1c2tbhdIjJfI6skGwXH2IN3-iVX6zKvl41Wg==) or by calling the Department of Health Monday-Friday at 222-8022. To be clear, this is for people without symptoms. If you have symptoms, you should call your primary care physician or community health center and get tested as soon as possible.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wETZDyaqGy7z6her7OwQotbOi2m7OXImzsUvcIqiyDtvWg3WXF7UnJEZS7KjFwAbNF8_lgiPxRU5mxT7Sj8Jz1bWK0E81LREPADayPmQewdPgfoxT5hLzaMCfvA30rV_70pyUjoefPQkNJaeVEXSdlqZvjne60X35ZrbSzvfjEco761OshW6-dfGHLkfh3y9_3Fw54wn0tA=&c=OKUz4ozz0G1y70VXP5ppWovXLliSC6wJuB8to0uT_UqI6WLFgKQNmw==&ch=_wsfQI3GGyY52LMzDm1c2tbhdIjJfI6skGwXH2IN3-iVX6zKvl41Wg==)
---
| Click the graph to see check the Department of Health's [COVID-19 data dashboard](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wETZDyaqGy7z6her7OwQotbOi2m7OXImzsUvcIqiyDtvWg3WXF7UnJEZS7KjFwAbNF8_lgiPxRU5mxT7Sj8Jz1bWK0E81LREPADayPmQewdPgfoxT5hLzaMCfvA30rV_70pyUjoefPQkNJaeVEXSdlqZvjne60X35ZrbSzvfjEco761OshW6-dfGHLkfh3y9_3Fw54wn0tA=&c=OKUz4ozz0G1y70VXP5ppWovXLliSC6wJuB8to0uT_UqI6WLFgKQNmw==&ch=_wsfQI3GGyY52LMzDm1c2tbhdIjJfI6skGwXH2IN3-iVX6zKvl41Wg==).
---
| As you probably know by now, our congressional delegation has worked hard to secure $1.25 billion of CARES Act funding for Rhode Island. We've asked for your trust over the last few months as we adopt new measures to prevent the spread of COVID-19. As a public official, my job is to earn that trust by keeping our government transparent. That's why I am committed to making sure you have full access to the records of what our CARES Act funding is spent on and who is receiving it.
Today, I'm proud to announce our new CARES Act transparency portal, [www.transparency.ri.gov/covid-19](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wETZDyaqGy7z6her7OwQotbOi2m7OXImzsUvcIqiyDtvWg3WXF7UnFG7QP4pOP2MYJSfj8NK3UjpeI6xTko8-DL1ioCaPLXJByvu7XiAdfQuJ5oHHu1A4-9AW6VrSKoC26tMNVAY46toUyuUutNC7c2-1Lgb8ZfxCykZsF6LEO0=&c=OKUz4ozz0G1y70VXP5ppWovXLliSC6wJuB8to0uT_UqI6WLFgKQNmw==&ch=_wsfQI3GGyY52LMzDm1c2tbhdIjJfI6skGwXH2IN3-iVX6zKvl41Wg==). This website will be updated monthly so all Rhode Islanders can see exactly how these emergency funds are being spent. I encourage you to take a look and, if you have something you want to share, use the button at the bottom of the page to give us your feedback.
We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor

clean_body: Your RI COVID-19 News Update | | | | | | | Hello friend, Right now, there are many housing-insecure Rhode Islanders that need a safe place to stay. Homelessness is always devastating, but all the more so during a global pandemic. My team has been working around the clock to provide support to our most vulnerable during this time. One of the ways we're doing that is by providing rental assistance to as many housing-insecure Rhode Islanders as we can. Unfortunately, despite the fact that a majority of their rent is guaranteed by the state each month, Rhode Islanders with housing vouchers often struggle to find landlords who are willing to rent to them. That's always wrong, but it's especially dangerous now. Earlier this week, we launched the Housing Now! campaign in partnership with the United Way and the Rhode Island Realtor's Association. We are challenging Rhode Island landlords to pledge at least 100 rental units by July 1. To support this initiative, we're going to provide financial incentives to landlords that rent units to households experiencing homelessness. United Way is facilitating this program and will help match renters and landlords, so all landlords need to do is call 211 today. This is a real opportunity for landlords to do the right thing and help their fellow Rhode Islanders, but also get some economic security during these unprecedented times. | == | I also want to take a moment to address testing. Right now, Rhode Island runs more COVID-19 tests per capita than any other state. The main focus of our testing strategy has been--and will continue to be--testing people with symptoms. But it's also important that we test people who are asymptomatic--especially because they may have the virus and not be exhibiting symptoms yet. We have the capacity to run 900 of these asymptomatic tests a day, but we've only been averaging about half of that so far. I'm not satisfied with those numbers. We need to get more people tested so we can get better information about this virus and how it's affecting our communities. Today, I'm announcing that we're expanding our asymptomatic testing program to include restaurant workers and bus drivers. If you fall into one of these categories, you can get tested by going to == or by calling the Department of Health Monday-Friday at 222-8022. To be clear, this is for people without symptoms. If you have symptoms, you should call your primary care physician or community health center and get tested as soon as possible. | == | Click the graph to see check the Department of Health's ==. | As you probably know by now, our congressional delegation has worked hard to secure $1.25 billion of CARES Act funding for Rhode Island. We've asked for your trust over the last few months as we adopt new measures to prevent the spread of COVID-19. As a public official, my job is to earn that trust by keeping our government transparent. That's why I am committed to making sure you have full access to the records of what our CARES Act funding is spent on and who is receiving it. Today, I'm proud to announce our new CARES Act transparency portal, ==. This website will be updated monthly so all Rhode Islanders can see exactly how these emergency funds are being spent. I encourage you to take a look and, if you have something you want to share, use the button at the bottom of the page to give us your feedback. We're all in this together. -Gina Raimondo Governor P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19, If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use ==. | | Governor's Office | 82 Smith Street, Providence, RI 02903 | | Sent by mailto:communications@governor.ri.gov in collaboration with |

After my opinion piece called for stopping the riots in our streets, the New York Times launched an apology tour to appease the radicals running their newsroom.

It is embarrassing that a once-respected newsroom is now being run like a social justice seminar on a college campus.

Peter, while the meltdown ensued at the the Times, my team launched a takeover of their website with ads attacking Joe Biden.

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: BREAKING: Senate Just Voted to End Walz' Illegal Powers
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=senate_just_voted_to_end_walz&n=1)
---
Peter -- **BREAKING: The Minnesota Republican Senate heard you loud and clear. They just voted to End Walz' Emergency Powers by a[38-29 vote](http://www.action4liberty.com/senate_votes_to_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=senate_just_voted_to_end_walz&n=2)!** Action 4 Liberty has championed the issue since March and got all House Republicans on board with the Munson Resolution back in late April. However, the Republican controlled Senate refused to bring a vote on the resolution before adjourning in May. Thanks to you, the Senate finally did what we DEMANDED of them. They may have come kicking and screaming along the way, but in the end, how could they ignore the thousands of phone calls and emails you made?! More importantly, three Democrat senators broke from protecting their party's governor, and joined Republicans in ending the emergency powers. Here's the vote: [](http://www.action4liberty.com/senate_votes_to_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=senate_just_voted_to_end_walz&n=3) **I can't thank you enough for taking the time to contact your Senator this week. It truly made a difference!** But the battle isn't over. We need the Democrat controlled House to pass the Munson resolution to end Walz' powers. If successful, the emergency powers that Walz' has used to shut down our economy and infringe on Minnesotan's rights, will be terminated. This is a huge victory for Minnesotans today and it could not have been done without the support of Action 4 Liberty supporters and donors around the state. The House is a big obstacle, but we will do everything we can to get the vote. **In Liberty,

** **Jake Duesenberg** **President, Action 4 Liberty**
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=senate_just_voted_to_end_walz&n=4).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](http://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=senate_just_voted_to_end_walz&n=5).
Created with [NationBuilder](http://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=senate_just_voted_to_end_walz&n=6), software for leaders.

body:
I wanted to fill you in on new developments with our campaign from the past week Happy Friday, friend! Can you feel the excitement in the air right now? We entered Phase 3 of reopening today, summer is in full swing, and our primary election is just 11 days away!
Here’s this week’s roundup of everything we’ve been doing as we gear up to flip NY-22 from blue to red! **⬇️ CAN’T MISS HEADLINE FROM THIS WEEK ⬇️**
**The NRA Just Joined our Growing List of Endorsements! Watch our Video Below.** [ ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=0da0301bb3114fa4b5b4db5b26eb3dff&_e=QItm915VYKQ3eDEEP9RFtZ1F1Kp4B7aiLPLyQiQixiZu_Qjb4kGy0z8ie3ynKwQiEIY6nv2DeekfhOyN_cJ73a-W6PewM61AHxiUdYEqF9_TK-hKvYqGPzoffvchfYQelZjwR2Zp587Dym0yZoA8A4K3u4AlX5kB8LsRXPN6YW6f1P7PMUlaX1vCOvTzoi9oGX2Zc5rNZGI0HXplP6khSegedx7gr2RSvOp62PUpVLvkRVeL9Hy91b-58LlMfizTe6BzdvNagK7AvHrqGj2eXbNuC84JlCVukC8M8jSitxkJOczy7x4z0U2A9tNVPXj4RrwvQkIVNz2sRl9_fg6WczVwRryMC9Z300KD-56S960szn3A65uyfINyHpCDysZY_NCsyQcIRfGrCoiq5a7Y8_2P9FgGDBPi3ZqqnnUdn_edsKleujRWacWQRdfFu6TXmkJJczGfJ_Nnla1lsOCkKmzcfiE0g1CKyahceQWVk3s%3D) The 2nd Amendment isn’t a political issue in NY-22 – it’s a way of life! Our right to bear arms has been under attack by Democrats for years, and I’m ready to defend that right in Washington with the NRA’s support – and your support – right there alongside me.
View and share the video **[here.](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=0da0301bb3114fa4b5b4db5b26eb3dff&_e=QItm915VYKQ3eDEEP9RFtZ1F1Kp4B7aiLPLyQiQixiZu_Qjb4kGy0z8ie3ynKwQiEIY6nv2DeekfhOyN_cJ73a-W6PewM61AHxiUdYEqF9_TK-hKvYqGPzoffvchfYQelZjwR2Zp587Dym0yZoA8A4K3u4AlX5kB8LsRXPN6YW6f1P7PMUlaX1vCOvTzoi9oGX2Zc5rNZGI0HXplP6khSegedx7gr2RSvOp62PUpVLvkRVeL9Hy91b-58LlMfizTe6BzdvNagK7AvHrqGj2eXeA3z2-zZT3JsTgIzPDcWBguQUu8KJiSsvoPzUtbAItbttS44IC--v66w7XotZeVMTR5JdjtQ10Mh2bZ3nbSjZdXaMkGNeJuwYZO93vA-_QXwjj2hkP3NFwkOJgp3MBd23l1lSyGReaQqDgLewDBh8_WwyCsDGfedng1onAUCgW0dQUtoiROcPrhn6pt8melICXvBUEz6O9YglZFN-xEZnE%3D)** | |

** 🚨Will You Defend the Police? Anthony Brindisi Won’t 🚨**
[ ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=0da0301bb3114fa4b5b4db5b26eb3dff&_e=QItm915VYKQ3eDEEP9RFtU9QQextuPqnRZq2Ds9UEtX6INsXQvsWhFppCtX1F1ht-F0Augvs8XdrIQ1K1y_JvH5T-_DKS8mrXJjK4KjyvKZdD5QdnqU_WBlAY1SUgSuk_vOSA-08MdJzskYnfUF2uzVVyBp5A7EEwpYInVSz2hbOzUYd39fbaOoaeha5tOoylgyRgaRKVGYdVVlvn1nLCVLkkpZR_Bnnf7licLdvBNPeAZUboVDOH8kdzwfUZy5jtPcQ4SPLBkTYJaGZZzdeI_7Jzzomb5bgSu1g3a2Qd2s9X7YxJvk7zMTX2l7-XQoaWTXjAnCRC6WTMZw42GC8K4bBjGJ7ibHzSd92-SuoLW6NUrHGhMBHcW_5ZDJ6XSg6oWTvwLEZr9BJJjrB4FfRCa3N-WwCv00i32Gg6LykqYNQ9SLzd0s_eVqifzhIUDZpYM2eqYepB8njJeeuPFJ8g5O6y3p4RSjOnoGKLacgHtQ%3D)
Our nation’s brave men and women in blue are under attack right now – and Anthony Brindisi has yet to push back on demands to defund our local police department budgets. We need strong law enforcement now more than ever before, and it’s on us to defend – not defund – our police.

View and share the post **[here.](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=0da0301bb3114fa4b5b4db5b26eb3dff&_e=QItm915VYKQ3eDEEP9RFtU9QQextuPqnRZq2Ds9UEtX6INsXQvsWhFppCtX1F1ht-F0Augvs8XdrIQ1K1y_JvH5T-_DKS8mrXJjK4KjyvKZdD5QdnqU_WBlAY1SUgSuk_vOSA-08MdJzskYnfUF2uzVVyBp5A7EEwpYInVSz2hbOzUYd39fbaOoaeha5tOoylgyRgaRKVGYdVVlvn1nLCVLkkpZR_Bnnf7licLdvBNPeAZUboVDOH8kdzwfUZy5jtPcQ4SPLBkTYJaGZZzdeI9BO7BgQoBtSSQopHD5L9aUCdeT0S5bgkmVL2Ggo7TO2sNiBEFEMknkU8xKg4z6s1DIq8atePnrXdnj_YZnjpM9bfMAUA39LZgU3nbyt3R4h6VnoOxhRydj5bdculFjIC7TaXs3Dn_I4LccFwZ564zvwdP3MGrodR0gon19xYPjrbbJFO0HMIBFVwHrB5EboY0uZvAiUXM579CrIa3_M1r4%3D)**

**Don Jr. Stopped by to Visit with Our Supporters This Week!**
[ ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=0da0301bb3114fa4b5b4db5b26eb3dff&_e=QItm915VYKQ3eDEEP9RFtU9QQextuPqnRZq2Ds9UEtX6INsXQvsWhFppCtX1F1ht5YpBF8gxREoSScqZiY9UO_t9wmuH-V402MtKFMdh-pCLquLlzGUl3f_LM44XC50MLGlYuFohPqhfRiuUzHV-VCYI7O9qHN77ndygJz3xEnvyNlzP9y7JQM6-DcmguJW_3281gkK3P2XGXyfRQ1PSRSPbI99D4t0-wrcgWiJGuDEFmybn-4VYeodfDk3D-JgfBDWQ-D9zPaumtmY-j0fi-pqpAY7pJJGMgkfr-ieetzcjVnrl6RHszQPppitFYskId0G-v3PVfBAu2YrAeT1Z79v3LvzcRu3_yLl4mnF5FUr-9LkcuByR1fb9OsGeCJgYvjtXtXqEBuxrFBVUyyHdjV0I8DqhLDtYp66TiS3_OH3F6gwlRa3WuOv5H0Qgk34r2ZcjyF11PAdmpUHdjiCF10p5jiXGM7_HydK5fawrWenjcoZPkB-sO1p2gnXUIwBf-nuOTu78xbK33zdvA8Ri_IDIVVV4Nmk-3xCyxd8S5sXqLbdm6cIFIheBaU1fkOeEkmeFgH8-A2ygvHGImyhcBAoa6pRJ4N-rghR3ccofjE6B1u-RpeTR4lRFlQKa6RCIHHCnifBSTkQ9y_8YdY98-FMwU12OxKBJpqR2iWBMCTCphR2XojW47UI5JlOmJupE8DRAFiMKXLTa7XreaMPMjSzSRAjvA-Pz-IwE0FAzGsOKK2m5JLVrfcRYS61D15JRJ2ePwSUoXw7WwVjq61Bywhm2sRRKpP-D01wjE18xawiUsXSLCMefggflSc4JD9NkU6a836ZMNg2WRFViyjAfJ3Qhuy1KLaYOifhB4LvKyOcchf6LROGQkaYNekZcDQJt5wY0XqOGGe_g3SJSf89I_FdX3_6dLeJP6aMv8xYLfav6u4a22-52_nTnQ73Wg2lZvGLXL04T3D9_RcU16cXHenQTTCcvSSvE8YpcsGYdzZc%3D)
I’m proud to have the full support of Donald Trump Jr. as we approach decision day here in NY-22. Here’s what he had to say about our campaign before doing a question and answer session with our supporters who were able to join the Zoom call:

clean_body: I wanted to fill you in on new developments with our campaign from the past week Happy Friday, friend! Can you feel the excitement in the air right now? We entered Phase 3 of reopening today, summer is in full swing, and our primary election is just 11 days away! Here’s this week’s roundup of everything we’ve been doing as we gear up to flip NY-22 from blue to red! ⬇️ CAN’T MISS HEADLINE FROM THIS WEEK ⬇️ The NRA Just Joined our Growing List of Endorsements! Watch our Video Below. The 2nd Amendment isn’t a political issue in NY-22 – it’s a way of life! Our right to bear arms has been under attack by Democrats for years, and I’m ready to defend that right in Washington with the NRA’s support – and your support – right there alongside me. View and share the video | | 🚨Will You Defend the Police? Anthony Brindisi Won’t 🚨 Our nation’s brave men and women in blue are under attack right now – and Anthony Brindisi has yet to push back on demands to defund our local police department budgets. We need strong law enforcement now more than ever before, and it’s on us to defend – not defund – our police. View and share the post | Don Jr. Stopped by to Visit with Our Supporters This Week! I’m proud to have the full support of Donald Trump Jr. as we approach decision day here in NY-22. Here’s what he had to say about our campaign before doing a question and answer session with our supporters who were able to join the Zoom call: “Claudia is indispensable to my father’s agenda. We need her in Congress to fight for making things in America again, to hold China accountable, and to grow our economy.” \- Donald Trump Jr. View and share the post | Hitting the Road in Support of Small Businesses Across NY-22 What better way to enjoy the warm weather than by taking the motorcycles out and supporting our local restaurants? We’re stopping by a different restaurant each night and visiting with supporters as part of our Spiedies to Riggies Outdoor Dining Tour – hope to see you on the road! I couldn’t be any prouder of our district’s students, parents, teachers, and coaches who have worked hard to overcome this year’s challenges. It’s time to abandon both of these clowns! Contributions by corporations, national banks, foreign nationals (non-green card holders), labor unions, federal government contractors, and minors under the age of 18 are prohibited. © 2017 By subscribing with your mobile number you are agreeing to receive periodic text messages from Claudia Tenney for Congress. Text message and/or data rates may apply. Text "STOP" to opt-out.

name: Cory Booker
subject: Add your name for comprehensive police reforms now
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CORY BOOKER FOR SENATE
body:
|
#
Friend, Since the tragic murder of George Floyd at the hands of police, the calls for justice have been loud and clear. Now is the time for policy change and legislative action. **That's why I'm a partner in the effort, along with Kamala Harris and Democratic Congressional leaders, to introduce the _Justice in Policing Act of 2020,_** a set of comprehensive reforms that will create stronger systems of transparency and accountability while bringing needed reform to police departments across the country. **[If you're ready for transformative change to America's policing, add your name right now to become a co-sponsor of this new legislation.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/cab-em-200612-justice?source=cab-em-200612-justice-full&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&City=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** | | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/cab-em-200612-justice?source=cab-em-200612-justice-full&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&City=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
---
As millions of Americans have continued to rise up and unite for justice in every corner of the country, I've spent the past few weeks working closely with Senator Harris as well as the Congressional Black Caucus to develop legislation that will address the unchecked bias and lack of accountability in our nation's police departments.
This bill is _just the first step_ to stopping the gut-wrenching injustices that have taken the lives of too many Black Americans for decades on end.
It aims to shine a light on abuse and corruption by **creating a federal database of police misconduct** , and strengthening the consequences for such actions by **ending the "qualified immunity"** that has long protected police officers from being held accountable for violating a person's rights.
It would also prevent the escalation and brutality that killed George Floyd and Breonna Taylor by **prohibiting chokeholds, banning no-knock warrants in drug cases, and putting an end to racial and religious profiling.**
**And finally, at long last, lynching would become a federal crime.**
It's been decades since legislation to reform policing like this has been introduced in Washington, and quite frankly it's long overdue. Ending systemic racism will not happen overnight or with one bill, but through this legislation, we can make real progress.
**[Join me in supporting the passage of these critical police reforms by adding your name now.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/cab-em-200612-justice?source=cab-em-200612-justice-full&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&City=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**
| [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/cab-em-200612-justice?source=cab-em-200612-justice-full&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&City=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
---
Together, let's rise and reform the system so we can end the institutionalized violence against Black lives in America.
- Cory

PAID FOR BY CORY BOOKER FOR SENATE
---
Cory Booker for Senate
8 Lombardy St
PO Box 346
Newark, NJ 07102

This email was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com**. If you'd like to update your contact information, you can do so **[here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0e86/5fca0d19/7d1b386e/291d4e44/3667306650/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiY2FiLWVtLTIwMDYxMi1qdXN0aWNlLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/cab-update-your-info?source=cab-em-200612-justice-full-footer")**. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe **[here](https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe)**.
---

"=" | | "=" As millions of Americans have continued to rise up and unite for justice in every corner of the country, I've spent the past few weeks working closely with Senator Harris as well as the Congressional Black Caucus to develop legislation that will address the unchecked bias and lack of accountability in our nation's police departments. This bill is just the first step to stopping the gut-wrenching injustices that have taken the lives of too many Black Americans for decades on end. It aims to shine a light on abuse and corruption by creating a federal database of police misconduct , and strengthening the consequences for such actions by ending the "qualified immunity" that has long protected police officers from being held accountable for violating a person's rights. It would also prevent the escalation and brutality that killed George Floyd and Breonna Taylor by prohibiting chokeholds, banning no-knock warrants in drug cases, and putting an end to racial and religious profiling. And finally, at long last, lynching would become a federal crime. It's been decades since legislation to reform policing like this has been introduced in Washington, and quite frankly it's long overdue. Ending systemic racism will not happen overnight or with one bill, but through this legislation, we can make real progress. "=" | "=" Together, let's rise and reform the system so we can end the institutionalized violence against Black lives in America. - Cory PAID FOR BY CORY BOOKER FOR SENATE Cory Booker for Senate 8 Lombardy St PO Box 346 Newark, NJ 07102
